content.query:
resources
| where type =~ "microsoft.operationsmanagement/solutions"
| where name has "SecurityInsights"
| parse name with * "(" s_workspace ")" *
| project workspaceName = tolower(s_workspace), location, subscriptionId, name
| join kind=leftouter (
    ResourceContainers
    | where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions"
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| join kind=leftouter (
    ManagedServicesResources
    | extend ManagedTenant =
        coalesce(
            tostring(properties.registrationDefinition.properties.manageeTenantName),
            tostring(properties.manageeTenantName)
        )
    | extend ManagedTenant = trim(@"[^\w\s\.-]+", ManagedTenant)
    | where isnotempty(ManagedTenant)
    | extend ManagedBy = tostring(properties.registrationDefinition.properties.registrationDefinitionName)
    // Reduce to 1 row per subscription to avoid duplicating workspaces
    | summarize
        Directory = any(ManagedTenant),
        ManagedBy = any(ManagedBy),
        AzureLighthouse = "Yes"
      by subscriptionId
) on subscriptionId
| extend AzureLighthouse = coalesce(AzureLighthouse, "No")
| project subscriptionName, workspaceName, subscriptionId, location, AzureLighthouse, Directory, ManagedBy
| order by AzureLighthouse desc, workspaceName asc
content.title: Find a Tenant or subscription , count: {$rowCount}

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces' 
| where id has "{Workspace}"
| extend state = trim(' ', tostring(properties.provisioningState))
		,sku   = trim(' ', tostring(properties.sku.name))
        ,skuUpdate = trim(' ', tostring(properties.sku.lastSkuUpdate))
		,retentionDays = trim(' ', tostring(properties.retentionInDays))
		,dailyquotaGB  = trim(' ', tostring(properties.workspaceCapping.dailyQuotaGb))
| extend dailyquotaGB = iif(dailyquotaGB !=-1.0, dailyquotaGB,"Not set")
| extend skuUpdate    = iif(strlen(skuUpdate) > 0, skuUpdate,"Unknown")
| extend sentinel     = iif(toint(retentionDays) < 90,"If you have Sentinel, you can change your retention to 90days (free)?","")
| project ['Log Analytics Workspace Name']=id, ['Resource Group']=resourceGroup, location, ['Data Retention(days)']=retentionDays, ['Last known SKU update']=skuUpdate, ['Daily Data Cap']=dailyquotaGB, ['Licence']=sku,  ['Commitment Tier']=properties.sku.capacityReservationLevel, ['Notes'] = sentinel

content.json:
## Workspace Usage Report 
### Change Log
Use this report to analyze the the sizes of the different tables and Latency in your workspace and agents. This report checks the overall workspace health.

|Version|Description|link|
|---|---|---|
|v1.1|Added Events Per Second (EPS) to Workspace Info Tab.| |
|v1.2|Added EPS with a breakdown for Device Vendor in CommonSecurityLog| |
|v1.3|Added EPS Tab and Min, Max values||
|v1.4|Added Checks Tab for Daily, Weekly and Monthly suggested checking routines. Also Defender for Cloud info in Costs Tab.||
|v1.4.2|Added Groups to all Tabs. Added Price info and Help button.||
|v1.4.3|Added to [COST] tab and report of "GBytes used per Computer"||
|v1.4.4|Quick fix to get the TableName duplicate removed. Added value to Y axis of [Cost] trend graph, Remove content (EPS) that is planned for the Sentinel Health workbook.||
|v1.4.5|Added extra Cost info, improve Weekly reports and other grids, testing release ONLY||
|v1.4.6|Moved Price to Costs Analysis Tab (all pricing is now in the same place). Added some table data, description and links to Latency grid. Filter on Queries in Weekly report and Workspace audit filters||
|v1.4.7|Add Pie chart of % billable vs. free to Cost Analysis. Add count of Rules, Rule Templates and Hunting Queries (just unique ones). Extra Defender for Cloud report for "minimal","common" and "all". Additional troubleshooting displays, when Help toggle is on. % used for Tables. User filter for LAqueries.||
|v1.4.8|[Cost Analysis] is now a Tab with Sub Menus to aid load times and readability. New features: Syslog Cost Analysis, CEF Cost Analysis. In the [OverView] sub menu, there are now reports on capacity / price per Subscription, Resource Group and Tags. The Sentinel tab has reports for Usage vs. Capacity Reservation and recommendations for the settings you are on, for Log Analytics and Sentinel.||
|v1.4.9|Add extra filtering within 'Advanced Workspace Details', so you can select other Workspaces to audit, and provide a link to the related Workbook (if it's installed). Add a filter for a basic level of data in the complex reports (default) or selected Advanced for the original longer running query. Added Automation rules to Alert Rules in Weekly reporting. Removed Tags section for now in Overview report. Added Sentinel cost estimate for retention.||
|v1.5.0|Added an ADX Tab (more to add here, maybe just a placeholder for now). Added some reports on Template rules vs Active Rule by *Type* (so you can see what is deployed vs. available by each rule type/category) in the Weekly reports. Fix for Chart bug that can cause a “out of memory” error. Wording swapped to "Commitment Tiers" rather than Capacity Reservation.||
|v1.5.1|Performance tweaks. GB to GB correction. Drill down on Computer costs. Add link to ADX insights||
|v1.6|Change to new product names + fix subscription issue||
|v1.6.1|Improve Weekly view and Rules. Add Function Alias view, add DCR view||
|v1.6.2|Add Table to Connectors / Solution mapping from external file|https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/little-slice-workspace-usage-workbook-reimagined-part-jon-shectman-8nxwe/|
|v1.6.3|Update daily checks|https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/little-slice-ofweekly-queries-your-soc-run-part-2-jon-shectman-siyce/?trackingId=%2BgAKE1e6SnW4dgnr969EBw%3D%3D|
|v1.6.4|Update Weekly checks| https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7440704185018236928?updateEntityUrn=urn%3Ali%3Afs_updateV2%3A%28urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7440704185018236928%2CFEED_DETAIL%2CEMPTY%2CDEFAULT%2Cfalse%29|
|v1.6.5|Onboarding checks, E5 Benefit Page in Sentinel, Retention Estimator in Microsoft Sentinel, SOC Metrics in Microsoft Sentinel, Identity Metrics in Microsoft Sentinel, Solution Mapping in Microsoft Sentinel| link to blog |

## Help File

More details in the Wiki: https://github.com/clivewatson/KQLpublic/wiki/Workbook-Usage

## Usage
	- Please select your **Subscription** and **Workspace**
	- Time Range: is the time you wish to query back to. i.e 7days from now, into the past.
	- Help is available in various parts of this Workbook.
	- Select the Detail Level - is a toggle to reduce the page load time of certain queries.
## Categories
	- Azure Monitor Logs (Workspace)
	- Sentinel
	- Defender for Cloud
## Solutions
|Solution|Description|
|---|---|
| Workspace Infomation | info about the workspace, usage and statistics|
|Latency | Which Tables or machines have latency issues, average, minimun and maximum values|
|Costs Analysis| Looking again at the tables in the [Workspace Info] tab, but also you can select a Price of your choosing (£,$).  Sub menus have been added to aid drill-down to specific products or data|
|Sentinel | specifc data about Sentinel|
| Regular Checks | Daily, Weekly and Monthly suggested checks you can look at.|

## Data Sources
	- Azure Resource Graph (ARG) and Various tables within Azure Monitor Logs (Workspace).

## Anomoly Detection
Some reports now show anomoly detection, this explains the Score: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/data-explorer/anomaly-detection#time-series-anomaly-detection

Anomaly scores above 1.5 or below -1.5 indicate a mild anomaly rise or decline respectively. Anomaly scores above 3.0 or below -3.0 indicate a strong anomaly.

parameters.query: {"version":"ARMEndpoint/1.0","data":null,"headers":[],"method":"GET","path":"/subscriptions/{Subscription:id}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{Workspace:name}/tables?api-version=2025-07-01","urlParams":[],"batchDisabled":false,"transformers":[{"type":"jsonpath","settings":{"tablePath":"$..value","columns":[{"path":"properties.plan","columnid":"plan"}]}}]}

parameters.name: selectPlan
parameters.label: Select TablePlan
parameters.query:
(
resources
| take 1
| project raw = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string("{getPlan}", "[", ""), "]", ""), "\"", "")
| extend items = split(raw, ",")
| mv-expand item = items
| extend plan = trim(" ", tostring(item))
| where isnotempty(plan)
| extend value = case(
    tolower(plan) has "basic", "(@.properties.plan=='Basic')",
    tolower(plan) has "analytics", "(@.properties.plan=='Analytics')",
    tolower(plan) has "auxiliary", "(@.properties.plan=='Auxiliary')",
    "(@.properties.plan=='Unknown')"
)
| extend label = case(
    tolower(plan) has "basic", "Basic",
    tolower(plan) has "analytics", "Analytics",
    tolower(plan) has "auxiliary", "Auxiliary / data lake",
    "Unknown"
)
| distinct label, value
)
| union (
resources
| take 1
| project raw = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string("{getPlan}", "[", ""), "]", ""), "\"", "")
| extend items = split(raw, ",")
| mv-expand item = items
| extend plan = trim(" ", tostring(item))
| where isnotempty(plan)
| extend norm = case(
    tolower(plan) has "basic", "Basic",
    tolower(plan) has "analytics", "Analytics",
    tolower(plan) has "auxiliary", "Auxiliary",
    "Unknown"
)
| distinct norm
| extend value = strcat("(@.properties.plan=='", norm, "')")
| summarize value = strcat_array(make_list(value), " || ")
| project label = "All", value
)
| extend sortOrder = iff(label == "All", 0, 1)
| order by sortOrder asc, label asc
| project value, label

- Table Name:The Log Analytics workspace Table
- Table Size: The sum of data stored in the Table.   
- Table Entries: The count of each row in the Table. 
- Size per Entry: Average capacity size of each row of data.
- IsBillable: Shows if the Table is Billable or Free  (True/False).
- Last Record Received: What was the time that the last record of data was received?

content.query:
let startTime = todatetime({TimeRange:start});
let endTime = todatetime({TimeRange:end});
let lookbackDays = max_of(1.0, todouble((endTime - startTime) / 1d));

let list_ = 
externaldata (
    Table:string,
    solution_Name:string,
    solution_Folder:string,
    solution_publisher_id:string,
    solution_offer_id:string,
    solution_first_publish_date:datetime,
    solution_last_publish_date:datetime,
    solution_version:string,
    solution_support_name:string,
    solution_support_tier:string,
    solution_support_link:string,
    solution_author_name:string,
    solution_categories:string,
    connector_id:string,
    connector_publisher:string,
    connector_title:string,
    connector_description:string,
    connector_instruction_steps:string,
    connector_permissions:string,
    connector_files:string,
    is_unique:bool
)
[
 @"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/refs/heads/master/Tools/Solutions%20Analyzer/solutions_connectors_tables_mapping.csv"
]
with (format="csv", ignoreFirstRecord=true)
| extend Table = trim(" ", tostring(Table));

let existing_tables =
Usage
| extend UsageTable = trim(" ", tostring(DataType))
| summarize TableExists = any("yes") by UsageTable;

let usage_stats =
Usage
| where TimeGenerated between (startTime .. endTime)
| extend UsageTable = trim(" ", tostring(DataType))
| summarize UsageIngestedGB = sum(Quantity) / 1024.0 by UsageTable
| extend UsageAverageDailyGB = UsageIngestedGB / todouble(lookbackDays);

list_
| where "All" in ({p_Table}) or Table in ({p_Table})
| where "All" in ({p_solution_Name}) or solution_Name in ({p_solution_Name})
| where "All" in ({p_solution_version}) or solution_version in ({p_solution_version})
| where "All" in ({p_solution_support_name}) or solution_support_name in ({p_solution_support_name})
| where "All" in ({p_solution_author_name}) or solution_author_name in ({p_solution_author_name})
| where "All" in ({p_connector_id}) or connector_id in ({p_connector_id})
| where "All" in ({p_connector_publisher}) or connector_publisher in ({p_connector_publisher})
| where "All" in ({p_connector_title}) or connector_title in ({p_connector_title})
| where "All" in ({p_is_unique}) or tostring(is_unique) in ({p_is_unique})
| join kind=leftouter (
    existing_tables
) on $left.Table == $right.UsageTable
| join kind=leftouter (
    usage_stats
) on $left.Table == $right.UsageTable
| extend TablePresent = case(
    isempty(Table), "Table missing",
    isnotempty(TableExists), "Table exists",
    "Table isn't enabled"
)
| extend
    IngestedGB = round(coalesce(UsageIngestedGB, 0.0), 4),
    AverageDailyGB = round(coalesce(UsageAverageDailyGB, 0.0), 4)
| project
    Table,
    TablePresent,
    AverageDailyGB,
    IngestedGB,
    solution_Name,
    solution_Folder,
    solution_publisher_id,
    solution_offer_id,
    solution_first_publish_date,
    solution_last_publish_date,
    solution_version,
    solution_support_name,
    solution_support_tier,
    solution_support_link,
    solution_author_name,
    solution_categories,
    connector_id,
    connector_publisher,
    connector_title,
    connector_description,
    connector_instruction_steps,
    connector_permissions,
    connector_files,
    is_unique
| where "All" in ({p_TablePresent}) or TablePresent in ({p_TablePresent})
| order by Table asc

content.query:
let timerange=180d;
let timeframe=30d;
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(timerange) .. ago(timeframe)) 
| where OperationName == "Invite external user"
| extend GuestUPN = tolower(tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName))
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by GuestUPN
| project TimeGenerated, GuestUPN, TenantId
| join kind=leftanti  (
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago (timerange)
    | where OperationName == "Redeem external user invite"
    | where CorrelationId <> "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
    | extend d = tolower(tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName))
    | parse d with * "upn: " GuestUPN "," *
    | project TimeGenerated, GuestUPN)
    on GuestUPN
| project TimeGenerated, GuestUPN, ['Days Since Invite Sent']=datetime_diff("day", now(), TimeGenerated), WorkspaceID=TenantId
| order by ['Days Since Invite Sent'] desc
content.title: Un-redeemed Guest invites older than 30days and less than 180 days

content.query:
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where ResultType != "0"
| extend ErrorDescription = case (
    ResultType == "7000215", strcat("Invalid client secret is provided"),
    ResultType == "7000222", strcat("The provided client secret keys are expired"),
    ResultType == "700027",  strcat("Client assertion failed signature validation"),
    ResultType == "700024",  strcat("Client assertion is not within its valid time range"),
    ResultType == "70021",   strcat("No matching federated identity record found for presented assertion"),
    ResultType == "500011",  strcat("The resource principal named [name] was not found in the tenant named [tenant]"),
    ResultType == "700082",  strcat("The refresh token has expired due to inactivity"),
    ResultType == "90025",   strcat("Request processing has exceeded gateway allowance"),
    ResultType == "500341",  strcat("The user account [identifier] has been deleted from the [tenant] directory"),
    ResultType == "100007",  strcat("AAD Regional ONLY supports auth either for MSIs OR for requests from MSAL using SN+I for 1P apps or 3P apps in Microsoft infrastructure tenants"),
    ResultType == "1100000", strcat("Non-retryable error has occurred"),
    ResultType == "90033",   strcat("A transient error has occurred. Please try again"),
    ResultType == "53003",   strcat("Access has been blocked by Conditional Access policies. The access policy does not allow token issuance."),
    // else
    "Unknown"
    )
| project TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalName, ServicePrincipalId, ErrorDescription, ResultType, IPAddress, WorkspaceID=TenantId
content.title: Service Principals - details

content.query:
//Find Azure AD Service Principals that have not successfully signed on for the last 30 days
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(180d)
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AppId,  WorkspaceID=TenantId
| project
    ['Last Successful Logon']=TimeGenerated,
    ServicePrincipalName,
    ServicePrincipalId,
    AppId, WorkspaceID
| join kind = leftanti (
    AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AppId,  WorkspaceID=TenantId
    )
    on AppId
| extend ['Days Since Last Logon']=datetime_diff("day", now(), ['Last Successful Logon'])
| project-reorder ['Days Since Last Logon'], ['Last Successful Logon'], ServicePrincipalName, AppId, ServicePrincipalId
| sort by ['Last Successful Logon'] desc
content.title: Azure AD Service Principals that have not successfully signed on for the last 30 days, count: {$rowCount}

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago (90d)
| where ResultType == "500121"
| mv-expand todynamic(AuthenticationDetails)
| project AuthenticationDetails, ResultType
| extend ['MFA Failure Type'] = tostring(parse_json(AuthenticationDetails).authenticationStepResultDetail)
| where ['MFA Failure Type'] startswith "MFA denied"
| summarize Count=count()by ['MFA Failure Type']
| sort by Count

//Simple query to count users being spammed with denies or not responding in one hour time windows
SigninLogs
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    AuthenticationRequirement,
    AuthenticationDetails,
    UserPrincipalName,
    CorrelationId
| where AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication"
| extend AuthResult = tostring(parse_json(AuthenticationDetails)[1].authenticationStepResultDetail)
| where AuthResult in ("MFA denied; user declined the authentication","MFA denied; user did not respond to mobile app notification")
| summarize ['Result Types']=make_list(AuthResult), ['Result Count']=count() by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 60m)
//Find hits with greater than 3 failures in an hour
| where ['Result Count'] > 3
content.title: Query to count users being spammed with denies or not responding in one hour time windows, count: {$rowCount}

content.query:
//Microsoft Sentinel query
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize
    ['Total Signin Count']=count(),
    ['Total MFA Count']=countif(AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication"),
    ['Total non MFA Count']=countif(AuthenticationRequirement == "singleFactorAuthentication")
    by AppDisplayName
| project
    AppDisplayName,
    ['Total Signin Count'],
    ['Total MFA Count'],
    ['Total non MFA Count'],
   MFAPercentage=(todouble(['Total MFA Count']) * 100 / todouble(['Total Signin Count']))
| sort by MFAPercentage asc
content.title: Percentage of authentications to each application that are covered by MFA, count: {$rowCount}

content.query:
//Microsoft Sentinel query
let privusers=
    IdentityInfo
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(21d)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountUPN
    | where isnotempty(AssignedRoles)
//Look for users who hold a privileged role or who have admin in their title, you may need to update to your naming standards
    | where AssignedRoles != "[]" or AccountUPN contains "admin"
    | distinct AccountUPN;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ResultType == 0
| where UserPrincipalName in~ (privusers)
| summarize
    ['Total Signin Count']=count(),
    ['Total MFA Count']=countif(AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication"),
    ['Total non MFA Count']=countif(AuthenticationRequirement == "singleFactorAuthentication")
    by UserPrincipalName
| project 
    UserPrincipalName,
    ['Total Signin Count'],
    ['Total MFA Count'],
    ['Total non MFA Count'],
   MFAPercentage=(todouble(['Total MFA Count']) * 100 / todouble(['Total Signin Count']))
| sort by MFAPercentage asc
content.title: MFA percentage for any users with an Azure AD role or ‘admin’ in their username, count: {$rowCount}

content.json:
### Define your SLA's or 1=High, 8=Medium, 24=Low will be used 

## - change HELP toggle to YES for more detail on SLA and Median, Average and P90 (tail-risk)

| Metric      | Tells You             |
| ----------- | --------------------- |
| **Median**  | Typical performance   |
| **Average** | Total workload impact |
| **P90**     | Long-tail risk        |

For example: 
- Median = 45 minutes (looks great) 
- P90 = 900 minutes (problem!  “How bad things get when they go wrong.”) 
- Average = 200 minutes (tail influencing cost, a.k.a tail-risk) 
-
Median reflects reality, average reflects mathematical distortion.   
Most incidents close quickly, however a small number take a very long time (waiting on customer, forensic work, third parties, etc... which is refelcted in the Average,  put simply: Average gets Distorted by Outliers)

Example

Imagine 100 incidents:

- 85 resolved in under 60 minutes
- 10 resolved in 2–4 hours
- 5 took 20+ hours

Median might be:
- 45 minutes (looks healthy)  

But P90 might be:
- 12 hours  

That means:
- 10% of incidents take 12+ hours

That’s your tail risk.

content.query:
// ---------------------------------------------
// 1) Build per-incident dataset (latest record)
// ---------------------------------------------
let Incidents =
    SecurityIncident
    | where isnotempty(IncidentNumber)
    | where isnotempty(CreatedTime)
    | summarize arg_max(LastModifiedTime, *) by IncidentNumber
    | extend
        // MTTT / MTTH: Created -> FirstModified
        TTT_hours = iff(isnotnull(CreatedTime) and isnotnull(FirstModifiedTime),
                        datetime_diff("minute", FirstModifiedTime, CreatedTime) / 60.0,
                        real(null)),

        // MTTC: Created -> Closed
        TTC_hours = iff(isnotnull(CreatedTime) and isnotnull(ClosedTime),
                        datetime_diff("minute", ClosedTime, CreatedTime) / 60.0,
                        real(null)),

        // MTTD: FirstActivity -> Created
        TTD_hours = iff(isnotnull(FirstActivityTime) and isnotnull(CreatedTime),
                        datetime_diff("minute", CreatedTime, FirstActivityTime) / 60.0,
                        real(null));

// ---------------------------------------------
// 2) Aggregate metrics
// ---------------------------------------------
Incidents
| summarize
    TotalIncidents = dcount(IncidentNumber),

    HighCount      = countif(Severity == "High"),
    MediumCount    = countif(Severity == "Medium"),
    LowCount       = countif(Severity == "Low"),
    Informational  = countif(Severity == "Informational"),

    MTTT_P50_hours = percentile(TTT_hours, 50),
    MTTC_P50_hours = percentile(TTC_hours, 50),
    MTTD_P50_hours = percentile(TTD_hours, 50),
    MTTC_P90_hours = percentile(TTC_hours, 90)

// ---------------------------------------------

Enabling both free and key paid data sources in Microsoft Sentinel ensures comprehensive security visibility while maintaining cost efficiency.
Free data sources (e.g., OfficeActivity, Azure AD/Entra ID Audit Logs, Defender alerts) provide valuable security telemetry at no additional ingestion cost, delivering immediate visibility into user activity, administrative actions, and security alerts. Leveraging these sources maximizes security coverage and improves detection capabilities without increasing operational spend.
Key paid data sources (such as firewall logs, endpoint telemetry, network security devices, and application logs) add deeper technical visibility into network traffic, endpoint behaviour, and system-level activity, enabling detection of more advanced threats, lateral movement, and data exfiltration.
By combining both types of data sources, organisations can:
Improve threat detection and investigation capabilities
Correlate activity across identity, endpoint, cloud, and network layers
Maximise value from existing Microsoft security tooling
Maintain cost control by prioritising high-value telemetry
This balanced approach allows security teams to achieve strong detection coverage and operational insight while optimising Sentinel ingestion costs.

content.query:
let lookback = 30d;

// Office workloads (single scan of OfficeActivity)
// Table = actual table name (OfficeActivity)
// description = workload label (SharePoint/Exchange/Teams/OneDrive)
let Office =
    OfficeActivity
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
    | where OfficeWorkload in ("SharePoint", "Exchange", "MicrosoftTeams", "OneDrive")
    | summarize Count=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) by OfficeWorkload
    | extend Table = "OfficeActivity"
    | extend description = case(
        OfficeWorkload == "MicrosoftTeams", "Teams",
        OfficeWorkload
    )
    | project Table, description, Count, IngestedGB;

let OfficeAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "OfficeActivity", "SharePoint",
      "OfficeActivity", "Exchange",
      "OfficeActivity", "Teams",
      "OfficeActivity", "OneDrive"
    ]
    | join kind=leftouter Office on Table, description
    | extend Count = coalesce(Count, 0)
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend isEnabled = iff(Count > 0, "True", "False")
    | project Table, description, isEnabled, Count, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// AzureActivity (single row)
let Azure =
    AzureActivity
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
    | summarize Count=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend Table="AzureActivity", description="AzureActivity"
    | extend isEnabled=iff(Count>0,"True","False")
    | project Table, description, isEnabled, Count, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// Defender alerts (single scan of SecurityAlert)
// Table = actual table name (SecurityAlert)
// description = alert family label
let Alerts =
    SecurityAlert
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
    | extend Table = "SecurityAlert"
    | extend description = case(
        ProviderName has "Azure Security Center", "Defender for Cloud Alerts",
        ProviderName has "MCAS", "Defender for Cloud Apps Alerts",
        ProviderName has "MDATP", "Defender for Endpoint Alerts",
        ProviderName has "OATP", "Defender for Office Alerts",
        ProviderName has "Azure Advanced Threat Protection", "Defender for Identity Alerts",
        ""
    )
    | where description != ""
    | summarize Count=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) by Table, description
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend isEnabled=iff(Count>0,"True","False")
    | project Table, description, isEnabled, Count, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

let AlertsAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "SecurityAlert", "Defender for Cloud Alerts",
      "SecurityAlert", "Defender for Cloud Apps Alerts",
      "SecurityAlert", "Defender for Endpoint Alerts",
      "SecurityAlert", "Defender for Office Alerts",
      "SecurityAlert", "Defender for Identity Alerts"
    ]
    | join kind=leftouter Alerts on Table, description
    | extend Count = coalesce(Count, 0)
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend isEnabled = iff(Count > 0, "True", "False")
    | project Table, description, isEnabled, Count, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

OfficeAll
| union Azure, AlertsAll
| order by Table asc, description asc
| project Table, description, isEnabled, ['Ingested GB'] = IngestedGB, ['Average Daily (GB)'] = AvgDailyGB

content.json:
These are free data sources and therefore always onboarded

### Data sources for these tables

| Table / Output Label | Underlying Table | Notes / Mapping Logic | Benefits / Why Enabled |
|---|---|---|---|
| SharePoint | OfficeActivity | `OfficeWorkload == "SharePoint"` | Provides visibility into SharePoint file access, sharing, downloads, and deletions to help detect suspicious behaviour and potential data exfiltration. |
| Exchange | OfficeActivity | `OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"` | Enables monitoring of mailbox activity including rule creation, forwarding, and administrative actions commonly associated with account compromise. |
| Teams | OfficeActivity | `OfficeWorkload == "MicrosoftTeams"` | Tracks collaboration activity such as file sharing and messaging actions to support investigation of insider threats or data leakage. |
| OneDrive | OfficeActivity | `OfficeWorkload == "OneDrive"` | Provides insight into personal file storage activity including uploads, downloads, and external sharing to detect abnormal data movement. |
| AzureActivity | AzureActivity | N/A | Captures Azure control-plane activity including resource creation, configuration changes, and administrative operations for security monitoring and auditing. |
| Defender for Cloud Alerts | SecurityAlert | `ProviderName has "Azure Security Center"` | Surfaces security posture and threat alerts related to Azure resources, vulnerabilities, and suspicious cloud activity. |
| Defender for Cloud Apps Alerts | SecurityAlert | `ProviderName has "MCAS"` | Provides alerts related to risky cloud app behaviour, anomalous user activity, and potential data exfiltration. |
| Defender for Endpoint Alerts | SecurityAlert | `ProviderName has "MDATP"` | Delivers endpoint threat detections including malware, suspicious processes, and attacker techniques observed on devices. |
| Defender for Office Alerts | SecurityAlert | `ProviderName has "OATP"` | Provides detections for phishing, malicious attachments, and email-based threats targeting Microsoft 365 users. |
| Defender for Identity Alerts | SecurityAlert | `ProviderName has "Azure Advanced Threat Protection"` | Detects identity-based attacks such as credential theft, lateral movement, and privilege escalation in hybrid environments. |

content.query:
let lookback = 30d;

// Workbook parameters (defaults if empty) - TEXT parameters
let EntraAAD_P = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{EntraAAD}")), 1, toint("{EntraAAD}"));
let Infra_P    = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{Infra}")),    2, toint("{Infra}"));
let CSL_P      = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{CSL}")),      2, toint("{CSL}"));
let MDE_P      = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{MDE}")),      3, toint("{MDE}"));
let MDO_P      = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{MDO}")),      3, toint("{MDO}"));
let MDI_P      = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{MDI}")),      3, toint("{MDI}"));
let Other_P    = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{Other}")),    4, toint("{Other}"));

// Section importance controls (defaults + overrides)
let SectionWeights =
    union
    (print Section="Entra/AAD", Importance=EntraAAD_P),
    (print Section="Infra",     Importance=Infra_P),
    (print Section="CSL",       Importance=CSL_P),
    (print Section="MDE",       Importance=MDE_P),
    (print Section="MDO",       Importance=MDO_P),
    (print Section="MDI",       Importance=MDI_P),
    (print Section="Other",     Importance=Other_P);

// Sentinel connector / solution mapping (from GitHub CSV)
let SentinelConnectorMapRaw =
externaldata (
    Table:string, solution_Name:string, solution_Folder:string, solution_publisher_id:string, solution_offer_id:string,
    solution_first_publish_date:datetime, solution_last_publish_date:datetime, solution_version:string,
    solution_support_name:string, solution_support_tier:string, solution_support_link:string,
    solution_author_name:string, solution_categories:string, connector_id:string, connector_publisher:string,
    connector_title:string, connector_description:string, connector_files:string, is_unique:bool
)
[
 @"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/refs/heads/master/Tools/Solutions%20Analyzer/solutions_connectors_tables_mapping.csv"
]
with (format="csv", ignoreFirstRecord=true);

// Keep a single best row per Table
let SentinelConnectorMap =
    SentinelConnectorMapRaw
    | where isnotempty(Table)
    | summarize arg_max(
        is_unique,
        solution_last_publish_date,
        solution_Name,
        connector_title,
        connector_publisher,
        solution_publisher_id
      ) by Table
    | extend Publisher = tostring(coalesce(connector_publisher, solution_publisher_id))
    | project
        Table,
        SentinelConnector     = tostring(connector_title),
        SolutionName          = tostring(solution_Name),
        Publisher,
        solution_publisher_id = tostring(solution_publisher_id),
        ConnectorType         = iff(tolower(Publisher) has "microsoft", "Microsoft", "Third-Party");

// E5 / benefit mapping
let E5Map = datatable(Table:string, E5:string)
[
    // Entra / AAD
    "AADManagedIdentitySignInLogs", "Yes",
    "AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs", "Yes",
    "AADProvisioningLogs", "Yes",
    "AADRiskyUsers", "Yes",
    "AADServicePrincipalRiskEvents", "Yes",
    "AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs", "Yes",
    "AADUserRiskEvents", "Yes",
    "ADFSSignInLogs", "Yes",
    "AuditLogs", "Yes",
    "SigninLogs", "Yes",

    // MDE
    "DeviceEvents", "Yes",
    "DeviceFileCertificateInfo", "Yes",
    "DeviceFileEvents", "Yes",
    "DeviceImageLoadEvents", "Yes",
    "DeviceInfo", "Yes",
    "DeviceLogonEvents", "Yes",
    "DeviceNetworkEvents", "Yes",
    "DeviceNetworkInfo", "Yes",
    "DeviceProcessEvents", "Yes",
    "DeviceRegistryEvents", "Yes",

    // MDI
    "IdentityDirectoryEvents", "Yes",
    "IdentityLogonEvents", "Yes",
    "IdentityQueryEvents", "Yes",

    // MDO
    "EmailAttachmentInfo", "Yes",
    "EmailEvents", "Yes",
    "EmailPostDeliveryEvents", "Yes",
    "EmailUrlInfo", "Yes",

    // MDCA
    "CloudAppEvents", "Yes",

    // Alerts / incidents if added later
    "AlertInfo", "Yes",
    "AlertEvidence", "Yes",
    "SecurityAlert", "Partial",
    "SecurityIncident", "Partial",

    // Other commonly referenced tables
    "AzureActivity", "Yes",
    "OfficeActivity", "Yes",
    "CommonSecurityLog", "No",
    "SecurityEvent", "No",
    "Syslog", "No",
    "WindowsEvent", "No",
    "ThreatIntelligenceIndicator", "No"
];

// ---------- Entra / AAD logs ----------
let AADEnabled =
    union
    (SigninLogs                      | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="SigninLogs",                      description="SigninLogs"),
    (AuditLogs                       | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="AuditLogs",                       description="AuditLogs"),
    (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs", description="AAD Non-Interactive Sign-ins"),
    (AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs   | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs",   description="Service Principal Sign-ins"),
    (AADServicePrincipalRiskEvents   | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="AADServicePrincipalRiskEvents",   description="Service Principal Risk Events"),
    (AADProvisioningLogs             | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="AADProvisioningLogs",             description="Provisioning logs"),
    (AADManagedIdentitySignInLogs    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="AADManagedIdentitySignInLogs",    description="Managed Identity logs"),
    (ADFSSignInLogs                  | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="ADFSSignInLogs",                  description="ADFS Sign-ins"),
    (AADUserRiskEvents               | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="AADUserRiskEvents",               description="User Risk Events"),
    (AADRiskyUsers                   | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="AADRiskyUsers",                   description="Risky Users")
    | project Table, description, c, IngestedGB;

let AADAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "SigninLogs",                     "SigninLogs",
      "AuditLogs",                      "AuditLogs",
      "AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs", "AAD Non-Interactive Sign-ins",
      "AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs",   "Service Principal Sign-ins",
      "AADServicePrincipalRiskEvents",   "Service Principal Risk Events",
      "AADProvisioningLogs",             "Provisioning logs",
      "AADManagedIdentitySignInLogs",    "Managed Identity logs",
      "ADFSSignInLogs",                  "ADFS Sign-ins",
      "AADUserRiskEvents",               "User Risk Events",
      "AADRiskyUsers",                   "Risky Users"
    ]
    | join kind=leftouter AADEnabled on Table, description
    | extend isEnabled = iff(coalesce(c,0) > 0, "True", "False")
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend Section = "Entra/AAD"
    | project Section, Table, description, isEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// ---------- Windows / Syslog tables ----------
let InfraEnabled =
    union
    (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="SecurityEvent", description="Windows Security Events"),
    (WindowsEvent  | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="WindowsEvent",  description="Windows Events"),
    (Syslog        | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="Syslog",        description="Syslog")
    | project Table, description, c, IngestedGB;

let InfraAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "SecurityEvent", "Windows Security Events",
      "WindowsEvent",  "Windows Events",
      "Syslog",        "Syslog"
    ]
    | join kind=leftouter InfraEnabled on Table, description
    | extend isEnabled = iff(coalesce(c,0) > 0, "True", "False")
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend Section = "Infra"
    | project Section, Table, description, isEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// ---------- CommonSecurityLog vendors ----------
let CSLVendorsEnabled =

        ""

    | where description != ""
    | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) by Table="CommonSecurityLog", description;

let CSLAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "CommonSecurityLog", "Cisco",

    | join kind=leftouter CSLVendorsEnabled on Table, description
    | extend isEnabled = iff(coalesce(c,0) > 0, "True", "False")
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend Section = "CSL"
    | project Section, Table, description, isEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// ---------- MDE tables ----------
let MDEEnabled =
    union
    (DeviceInfo                | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="DeviceInfo",                description="MDE Device Info"),
    (DeviceNetworkInfo         | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="DeviceNetworkInfo",         description="MDE Device Network Info"),

    (DeviceLogonEvents         | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="DeviceLogonEvents",         description="MDE Device Logon Events"),
    (DeviceImageLoadEvents     | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="DeviceImageLoadEvents",     description="MDE Device Image Load Events"),
    (DeviceEvents              | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="DeviceEvents",              description="MDE Device Events"),
    (DeviceFileCertificateInfo | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="DeviceFileCertificateInfo", description="MDE Device File Certificate Info")
    | project Table, description, c, IngestedGB;

let MDEAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "DeviceInfo",                "MDE Device Info",
      "DeviceNetworkInfo",         "MDE Device Network Info",
      "DeviceProcessEvents",       "MDE Device Process Events",
      "DeviceNetworkEvents",       "MDE Device Network Events",
      "DeviceFileEvents",          "MDE Device File Events",
      "DeviceRegistryEvents",      "MDE Device Registry Events",
      "DeviceLogonEvents",         "MDE Device Logon Events",
      "DeviceImageLoadEvents",     "MDE Device Image Load Events",
      "DeviceEvents",              "MDE Device Events",
      "DeviceFileCertificateInfo", "MDE Device File Certificate Info"
    ]
    | join kind=leftouter MDEEnabled on Table, description
    | extend isEnabled = iff(coalesce(c,0) > 0, "True", "False")
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend Section = "MDE"
    | project Section, Table, description, isEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// ---------- MDO tables ----------
let MDOEnabled =
    union
    (EmailEvents             | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="EmailEvents",             description="MDO Email Events"),
    (EmailUrlInfo            | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="EmailUrlInfo",            description="MDO Email URL Info"),
    (EmailAttachmentInfo     | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="EmailAttachmentInfo",     description="MDO Email Attachment Info"),
    (EmailPostDeliveryEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="EmailPostDeliveryEvents", description="MDO Email Post-Delivery Events")
    | project Table, description, c, IngestedGB;

let MDOAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "EmailEvents",             "MDO Email Events",
      "EmailUrlInfo",            "MDO Email URL Info",
      "EmailAttachmentInfo",     "MDO Email Attachment Info",
      "EmailPostDeliveryEvents", "MDO Email Post-Delivery Events"
    ]
    | join kind=leftouter MDOEnabled on Table, description
    | extend isEnabled = iff(coalesce(c,0) > 0, "True", "False")
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend Section = "MDO"
    | project Section, Table, description, isEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// ---------- MDI (own section) ----------
let MDIEnabled =
    union
    (IdentityLogonEvents     | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="IdentityLogonEvents",     description="MDI Logon Events"),
    (IdentityQueryEvents     | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="IdentityQueryEvents",     description="MDI Query Events"),
    (IdentityDirectoryEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="IdentityDirectoryEvents", description="MDI Directory Events")
    | project Table, description, c, IngestedGB;

let MDIAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "IdentityLogonEvents",     "MDI Logon Events",
      "IdentityQueryEvents",     "MDI Query Events",
      "IdentityDirectoryEvents", "MDI Directory Events"
    ]
    | join kind=leftouter MDIEnabled on Table, description
    | extend isEnabled = iff(coalesce(c,0) > 0, "True", "False")
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend Section = "MDI"
    | project Section, Table, description, isEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// ---------- Other (MDCA / TI) ----------
let OtherEnabled =
    union
    (CloudAppEvents              | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="CloudAppEvents",              description="MDCA Cloud App Events"),
    (ThreatIntelligenceIndicator | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | summarize c=count(), IngestedGB=round(sum(_BilledSize) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) | extend Table="ThreatIntelligenceIndicator", description="ThreatIntelligenceIndicator")
    | project Table, description, c, IngestedGB;

let OtherAll =
    datatable(Table:string, description:string)
    [
      "CloudAppEvents",              "MDCA Cloud App Events",
      "ThreatIntelligenceIndicator", "ThreatIntelligenceIndicator"
    ]
    | join kind=leftouter OtherEnabled on Table, description
    | extend isEnabled = iff(coalesce(c,0) > 0, "True", "False")
    | extend IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0)
    | extend AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / 30.0, 2)
    | extend Section = "Other"
    | project Section, Table, description, isEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// ---------- Final ----------
AADAll
| union InfraAll, CSLAll, MDEAll, MDOAll, MDIAll, OtherAll
| join kind=leftouter SectionWeights on Section
| join kind=leftouter SentinelConnectorMap on Table
| join kind=leftouter E5Map on Table
| extend
    SentinelConnector     = coalesce(SentinelConnector, ""),
    SolutionName          = coalesce(SolutionName, ""),
    Publisher             = coalesce(Publisher, ""),
    solution_publisher_id = coalesce(solution_publisher_id, ""),
    ConnectorType         = coalesce(ConnectorType, ""),
    E5                    = coalesce(E5, "No")
| project
    Importance,
    Section,
    Table,
    description,
    ['Included in E5 benefit']=E5,
    isEnabled,
    ['Ingested GB'] = IngestedGB,
    ['Average Daily (GB)'] = AvgDailyGB,
    SentinelConnector,
    SolutionName,
    Publisher,
    solution_publisher_id
| order by Importance asc, Section asc, Table asc, description asc

content.query:
//source: https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/azure-sentinel/ingestion-cost-spike-detection-playbook/ba-p/2591301
let UpperAnomalyThreshold = +3;
let ReportingQty = 0;
let PercentIncrease = {SelectPct};
let UpperThreshold = UpperAnomalyThreshold; //+3 is the suggested number and it indicates a strong anomaly though you can modify it : Outlier - Wikipedia
Usage
| where IsBillable == "true" //we are only interested in tables getting notified when a spike is detected in a billable table 
| where Quantity > ReportingQty //Allows you to report only on variations that are above a certain threshold that you deem significant enough to warrant an alert
| make-series Qty=sum(Quantity) on TimeGenerated from {TimeRange:start} to now() step 1d by DataType //creates a time series to look at the ingestion pattern over the period defined in the LookBack variable
| extend (anomalies, score, baseline) = series_decompose_anomalies(Qty, 1.5, 7, 'linefit', 1, 'ctukey', 0.01) //takes the time series of ingested data across the days specified in the ‘LookBack’ variable and extract anomalous points with scores based on predicted values using the linear regression concept. See https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/data-explorer/kusto/query/series-decompose-anomaliesfunction for a detailed explanation of each argument. For an explanation of 'ctukey' read: Outlier - Wikipedia.
| where anomalies[-1] == 1 or anomalies[-1] == -1 //the output of series_decompose_anomalies function is three things: A ternary (as opposed to binary) series containing (+1, -1, 0) marking up/down/no anomaly respectively, the Anomaly score and the predicted value or baseline. 
| extend Score = score[-1] //this part picks up the anomaly state from the most recent run. -1 indicates a position in the array. 
| where Score >= UpperAnomalyThreshold  //compare with strong anomaly indicator values extracted from the time series data
| extend PercentageQtyIncrease = ((round(todouble(Qty[-1]),0)-round(todouble(baseline[-1]),1))/round(todouble(Qty[-1]),0) * 100) //calculates percentage increase to present data in percent terms for easier appreciation of the anomaly
| project DataType,ExpectedQty=round(todouble(baseline[-1]),0), ActualQty=round(todouble(Qty[-1]),0),round(PercentageQtyIncrease,0)  
| order by  round(todouble(PercentageQtyIncrease),0) desc 
| where PercentageQtyIncrease >= PercentIncrease //only alert if the percentage increase exceeds the threshold beyond which you specified that you wish to be notified
content.title: Ingestion Spikes - anomaly detection > {SelectPct}% increase

content.json: ### End to End Latency Report by Table

In this report we measure the latency of a specific Table by comparing the result of the ingestion_time() function to the TimeGenerated property.
Source: https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/data-ingestion-time

content.query:
//
// Add enrichment information about selected Tables
//
let enrich = datatable (TableName:string,Information:string,link:string)
    [
    "Usage","This is common Usage data in all Workspaces","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/manage-cost-storage",
    "Operation","This is common Operations data in all Workspaces","",
    "OfficeActivity","This is a PUSH data source, typically <30mins (max ~1day)","https://docs.microsoft.com/office/office-365-management-api/troubleshooting-the-office-365-management-activity-api#what-is-the-maximum-time-i-will-have-to-wait-before-a-notification-is-sent-about-a-given-office-365-event",
    "Perf","Operational Data source, this can have limited value to Sentinel","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/agent-data-sources",
    "Event","Windows Server Event Logs","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/agent-data-sources",
    "Syslog", "Syslog messages using Common Event Format (CEF) streamed from variety of security solutions.Learn more","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/sentinel/connect-data-sources",
    "SecurityAlert","Security Alerts from various sources","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/sentinel/connect-data-sources",
    "Alert","Alerts from Azure Monitor sources","",
    "AWSCloudTrail","Sentinel: AWS Cloud trail connector","",
    "Anomalies","Sentinel: This table contains anomalies generated by the active Anomaly analytics rules in Sentinel.","",
    "AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs","Non-interactive Azure Active Directory sign-in logs from user","",
      "SecurityEvent","Data from Defender for Cloud  or Sentinel","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/sentinel/connect-data-sources",
    "CommonSecurityLog","CEF data for Sentinel, from multiple vendors","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/sentinel/connect-data-sources",
    "SecurityIncident","Incident events from Sentinel, also see SecurityAlert","",
    "Heartbeat", "MMA info from Log Analytics agents","",
    "LAQueryLogs","Auditing of the workspace has been set","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/log-query/query-audit",
    "VMConnection","Azure Monitor for VMs or Service Map","https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/vmconnection",
    "KubeServices","AKS data sources","",
    "Update","Patching info","",    
    "ThreatIntelligenceIndicator","Sentinel TI data","", 
    "AuditLogs","Azure AAD audit information","", 
    "SigninLogs","Azure AAD Signin information","", 
    "AzureActivity","Azure Activity Logs","",
    "HuntingBookmark","Sentinel - Hunting book mark data","",  
    "UserPeerAnalytics","Sentinel - UEBA","",  
    "UserAccessAnalytics","Sentinel - UEBA","",  
    "IdentityInfo","Sentinel - UEBA","",  
    "BehaviorAnalytics","Sentinel - UEBA","", 
    "DeviceEvents","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains Multiple event types, including events triggered by security controls such as Windows Defender Antivirus and exploit protection.","",
    "DeviceFileEvents","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains File creation, modification, and other file system events.","",  
    "DeviceImageLoadEvents","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains DLL loading events","",  
    "DeviceInfo","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains Machine information, including OS information.","",  
    "DeviceLogonEvents","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains Sign-ins and other authentication events","",  
    "DeviceNetworkEvents","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains Network connection and related events.","",  
    "DeviceNetworkInfo","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains Network properties of machines, including adapters, IP and MAC addresses, as well as connected networks and domains.","", 
    "DeviceProcessEvents","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains Process creation and related events.","", 
    "DeviceRegistryEvents","Sentinel: This table is part of Microsoft Defender for Endpoints with Sentinel. This table contains Creation and modification of registry entries.","",             
    "DnsInventory","DNS Analytics (Preview)","",     
    "W3CIISLog","IIS log data from Azure Monitor Logs",""
    ]
; 
// Gather and calculate Latency information
union withsource = TableName1 *
| summarize 
      ['average E2E IngestionLatency'] = round(avg(todouble(datetime_diff("Second",ingestion_time(),TimeGenerated)) ),2)
    , ['minimun E2E IngestionLatency'] = round(min(todouble(datetime_diff("Second",ingestion_time(),TimeGenerated)) ),2) 
    , ['maximum E2E IngestionLatency'] = round(max(todouble(datetime_diff("Second",ingestion_time(),TimeGenerated)) ),2)
  by TableName = TableName1
| sort by ['average E2E IngestionLatency'] desc
// join to enrichment and remove unwanted columns 
| join kind= fullouter (enrich) on TableName
| where isnotempty(TableName)
| project-away TableName1

| extend E2EIngestionLatency = todouble(datetime_diff("Second",ingestion_time(),TimeGenerated)) 
| extend AgentLatency        = todouble(datetime_diff("Second",_TimeReceived,TimeGenerated)) 
| summarize avg(E2EIngestionLatency),avg(AgentLatency) by bin(TimeGenerated,1h)

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend State = iff(LastHeartbeat < ago({UnhealthyCriteria}), 'Unhealthy', 'Healthy')
| extend TimeFromNow = now() - LastHeartbeat
| extend ["TimeAgo"] = strcat(case(TimeFromNow < 2m, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1s), ' seconds'), TimeFromNow < 2h, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1m), ' minutes'), TimeFromNow < 2d, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1h), ' hours'), strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1d), ' days')), ' ago')
| join (
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Packed = pack_all()
) on Computer
| where TimeGenerated == LastHeartbeat
| join (
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}

### Workspace Pricing

Price Parameter: Please provide an estimated cost so that we can get a value in the "Estimated Table Price" column, in the [Workspace Info] tab.   
i.e If your Log Analytics PAYG is £2.00 per GB enter 2.00.  You can enter an interger (without a currency symbol), in format 1.0, 2.0, 3.1 etc...  
If you want to see the combined Log Analytics + Sentinel estimated cost please use both PAYG prices i.e. 2.00 + 2.00 = 4.00.  Please see the licence pages for both products.

Base value on 7th July 2020, using an example of Sentinel ($2.46 US Central PAYG) + Log Analytics ($2.76 US Central PAYG) 


Note: No capacity reservation is taken into account.


### Anomoly Detection
Some reports now show anomoly detection, this explains the Score:
https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/data-explorer/anomaly-detection#time-series-anomaly-detection

Anomaly scores above 1.5 or below -1.5 indicate a mild anomaly rise or decline respectively. Anomaly scores above 3.0 or below -3.0 indicate a strong anomaly.

### Microsoft Defender for Cloud (formally Azure Security Center) 

Defender for Cloud allows for 500MB/day (0.5GBytes) of *free* data to be sent by each Computer. Please see the licencing link at the bottom of this text box.
You have two variables
1. The total allowed: < number of computers> * 0.5GB  (this is a pooled metric). 	
	e.g 4 computers * 0.5GB = 2.0GB, the maximum value which is allowed to be sent for free.  Any data over this number will have the standard (Sentinel + Log Analytics) charge applied.     
2. The actual data sent by each computer
	e.g 4 * computers * 0.1GB = 0.4GB, which is allowed for free.

To fully calculate the Microsoft Sentinel average GBytes per day, if D4C data is present, we need to  take #1 from the total or #2.  This is shown as the "Revised GB Number". 

### Note: Licencing is subject to change, you must fully investigate and understand from the current documentation the implications.
https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/security-center/  correct as of 17th September 2020.

content.json:
### Commitment Tier Insight
This report, shows the Average GB/day (based on the TimeRange parameter), which is rounded up to the nearest whole number, this is the number the Azure Pricing Calculator requires. https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/calculator/ for Sentinel.
- The Pay as You Go (PAYG_estimate) is the GB/day multiplied by the [Sentinel Price] parameter, default is 2.0 (the price in $ for EAST US).  This is location and currency neutral, so adjust to your own preferred value.  This is the Daily estimate of the price.
- The Pay as You Go (PAYG_estimate_mthly) is the Monthly (31day) estimate of the price.
- Commitment Tier_Estimate_Monthly is the (PAYG_estimate_mthly) minus any discount for the commitment Tier that is *currently* set.
- Data ingested into Sentinel exceeding the selected daily commitment tier is charged at the effective tier prices. source: https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/azure-sentinel/

content.query:
project actual_ = '{GBperday}' , roundUp_ = round(toreal('{GBperday}'),0)
| extend lookBack = 31
| extend roundUp_ = iif(isnan(roundUp_),toreal(0),toreal(roundUp_))
| extend PAYG_estimate = roundUp_ * {SentinelPrice}
| extend discountRate = iif(isempty('{discountRate}'),"0",'{discountRate}')    
| extend PAYG_estimate_mthly = (PAYG_estimate * lookBack)
| extend CT_estimate_mthly = PAYG_estimate_mthly * tolong(discountRate) / 100
| summarize by ['avg GB/day']=roundUp_, PAYG_estimate, PAYG_estimate_mthly, CT_estimate_mthly
content.title: Commitment Tier. Price per GB:{SentinelPrice},  Discount %: {discountRate}

content.json:
### Commitment Tier for your Average GB/day value?  
This report helps you decide:
- A green circle in a Status column 🟢 indicates your are on the Optimal setting, based on your average data ingestion (GB/day) and Pay As You Go/commitment tier settings.
- A recommend value of "0" / zero, means that you are on a setting (SKU) such as Free, PerGB etc.. rather than a commitment tier setting.
- If the 'recommend' Sentinel or Workspace setting doesn't match the 'current' setting you will get a Red Cross in the Status columns ❌.
- Please read https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/azure-sentinel/ and https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/monitor/ before deciding.

content.query:
project actual_ = '{GBperday}' , roundUp_ = round(toreal('{GBperday}'),0)
| extend lookBack = 31
| extend i = roundUp_ //* 100
| extend i = iif(isnan(i),toreal(0),toreal(i))
// Sentinel commitment tier logic
| extend recommendedSentinelCT = case(
    i  <= 50,"0",
    i between (51 .. 180),"100",
    i between (181 .. 286),"200",
    i between (287 .. 390),"300",
    i between (391 .. 476),"400",
    i between (477 .. 975),"500",
    i between (976 .. 1897),"1000",
    i between (1898 .. 4729),"2000",
    i >= 4730 ,"5000",
    //else
    strcat("unknown Sentinel CT: ", i)
)
// Azure Log Analytics (LAW) commitment tier logic
| extend recommendedWorkspaceCT = case(
    i <= 85,"0",
    i between (86 .. 187),"100",
    i between (188 .. 293),"200",
    i between (294 .. 391),"300",
    i between (392 .. 491),"400",
    i between (492 .. 982),"500",
    i between (983 .. 1952),"1000",
    i between (1953 .. 4849),"2000",
    i >= 4850 ,"5000",
    //else
    strcat("unknown LAW CT: ", i)
)
| extend avgDataPerDay = i
| extend currentSentinelCT = iif(isempty('{SentinelCap}'),"0",'{SentinelCap}')
| extend currentWorkspaceCT = iif(isempty('{lawCap}'),"0",'{lawCap}')
| extend sentinelOptimal = iif(recommendedSentinelCT == currentSentinelCT,1,0)
| extend lawOptimal = iif(recommendedWorkspaceCT == currentWorkspaceCT,1,0)
| summarize by ['avg GB/day']=avgDataPerDay,['Sentinel Status']=sentinelOptimal, ['Log Analytics Status']=lawOptimal, recommendedSentinelCT, recommendedWorkspaceCT,currentSentinelCT, currentWorkspaceCT

## Defender for Cloud : Usage Reports
- - -

The following two charts help you understand Microsoft Defender for Cloud / **SecuityEvent** data if its present.
- Top 10 computers, sending that SecuityEvent logs information & the capacity SecuityEvent 
- The final chart shows the potential allowance (each Defender for Cloud licence allows for 500MB/day). 
	
	- Defender for Cloud / a.k.a "Azure Defender ON" was formally "ASC standard". 
	- You can see what was Used vs. Allowed  (where allowed = 500MB * < count of servers>)

content.query:
// https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/logs/manage-cost-storage#log-analytics-and-security-center
let ascTables = dynamic(['WindowsEvent', 'SecurityAlert', 'SecurityBaseline', 'SecurityBaselineSummary', 'SecurityDetection', 'SecurityEvent','WindowsFirewall', 'MaliciousIPCommunication', 'LinuxAuditLog', 'SysmonEvent', 'ProtectionStatus']);
union withsource = tt *
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where _IsBillable == True
// Calculate the daily GB size per billable Table and unique Server count 
| summarize allGBytes =sum(_BilledSize)/(1024*1024*1024), ascGBytes=sumif(_BilledSize, Type in (ascTables))/(1024*1024*1024), ascComputerCount = dcountif(Computer,tt in (ascTables)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
// Calculate daily GB average, and average ASC server count.  Each Server is allowed max 0.5GB each
| summarize avg(allGBytes), avg(ascGBytes),ascComputers=round(avg(ascComputerCount),0),ascMaxGB = avg(ascComputerCount) * 0.5
// If ASC sends less than the allowed max, revise the GB averge per day, else use the max allowed (all servers * 0.5)
| extend revisedNumber = iif(avg_ascGBytes <= ascMaxGB, allMinusASCused = (avg_allGBytes - avg_ascGBytes),allMinusASCused = (avg_allGBytes - ascMaxGB) )
| extend withinPool = iif(avg_ascGBytes >= ascMaxGB,"Yes","No")
| extend overBy = iif(round(avg_ascGBytes,2) - round(ascMaxGB,2) < 0 , toreal(0),  round(avg_ascGBytes,2) - round(ascMaxGB,2)  )
| project ['Raw Average GB']   = avg_allGBytes,
          ['Defender has used, GB'] = strcat(round(avg_ascGBytes,1)," GB of " ,round(ascMaxGB,1), " GB across ", ascComputers , " Computers"), 
          ['Revised GB Number']= round(revisedNumber,2),
          ['Help'] ="Please toggle [Show Help] to Yes,  for more information", 
          ['Sent more than allocation?'] = withinPool,
          ['Overage in GB'] =  overBy

content.query:
//Infers Potential P1 usage
//Infers Potential P2 usage
//Calculates:
//Potential P1 user count
//Potential P2 user count
//Total distinct users
//Still keeps the supporting signal metrics


let lookback = 30d;
let minCASigninsForSignal = 10;
let minRiskSigninsForSignal = 5;

let base =
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| extend HasCAArray = isnotempty(ConditionalAccessPolicies)
| mv-expand CA = iff(HasCAArray, ConditionalAccessPolicies, dynamic([dynamic(null)])) to typeof(dynamic)
| extend CAResult = tostring(CA.result)
| extend CAApplied =
    iff(HasCAArray and CAResult in ("success","failure","reportOnlySuccess","reportOnlyFailure"), 1, 0)
| extend RiskSignal =
    iff(
        tostring(RiskState) != "" and tostring(RiskState) != "none"
        or tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn) != "" and tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn) != "none"
        or tostring(RiskDetail) != "" and tostring(RiskDetail) != "none",
        1, 0
    )
| extend StrongP2Signal =
    iff(
        tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn) in ("medium","high")
        or (tostring(RiskDetail) !in ("none","", "hidden") and tostring(RiskDetail) !contains "none"),
        1, 0
    );

let userLevel =
base
| summarize
    UserCASignins = sum(CAApplied),
    UserRiskSignals = sum(RiskSignal),
    UserStrongP2Signals = sum(StrongP2Signal)
  by TenantId, UserPrincipalName
| extend P1User =
    iff(UserCASignins > 0, 1, 0)
| extend P2User =
    iff(UserStrongP2Signals >= minRiskSigninsForSignal
        or UserRiskSignals >= minRiskSigninsForSignal,
        1, 0);

userLevel
| summarize
    TotalDistinctUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    PotentialP1Users   = sum(P1User),
    PotentialP2Users   = sum(P2User)
  by TenantId
| join kind=leftouter (
    base
    | summarize
        TotalSignins = dcount(CorrelationId),
        CAAppliedSignins = sum(CAApplied),
        RiskySignins = sum(RiskSignal),
        StrongP2Signals = sum(StrongP2Signal)
      by TenantId
) on TenantId
| extend PotentialP1 =
    case(
        PotentialP1Users >= 1 and CAAppliedSignins >= minCASigninsForSignal, "Likely in use",
        PotentialP1Users >= 1, "Possible",
        "No signal"
    )
| extend PotentialP2 =
    case(
        PotentialP2Users >= 1 and StrongP2Signals >= minRiskSigninsForSignal, "Likely in use",
        PotentialP2Users >= 1, "Possible",
        "No signal"
    )
| project
    //TenantId,
    PotentialP1,
    PotentialP2,
    TotalDistinctUsers,
    PotentialP1Users,
    PotentialP2Users,
    TotalSignins,
    CAAppliedSignins,
    RiskySignins,
    StrongP2Signals
//| order by TenantId asc
content.title: P1/P2 check

content.query:
let lookback = 30d;
let E5Licenses = toint("{E5Licenses}");
let FreeAllowanceMBPerDay = E5Licenses * 5;
let FreeAllowanceGBPerDay = round(todouble(FreeAllowanceMBPerDay) / 1000.0, 2);

// =====================
// Expected E5 tables by section
// =====================
let ExpectedE5 =
    datatable(Table:string, Section:string)
    [
        "AADManagedIdentitySignInLogs", "Entra/AAD",
        "AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs", "Entra/AAD",
        "AADProvisioningLogs", "Entra/AAD",
        "AADRiskyUsers", "Entra/AAD",
        "AADServicePrincipalRiskEvents", "Entra/AAD",
        "AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs", "Entra/AAD",
        "AADUserRiskEvents", "Entra/AAD",
        "ADFSSignInLogs", "Entra/AAD",
        "AuditLogs", "Entra/AAD",
        "SigninLogs", "Entra/AAD",
        "DeviceEvents", "MDE",
        "DeviceFileCertificateInfo", "MDE",
        "DeviceFileEvents", "MDE",
        "DeviceImageLoadEvents", "MDE",
        "DeviceInfo", "MDE",
        "DeviceLogonEvents", "MDE",
        "DeviceNetworkEvents", "MDE",
        "DeviceNetworkInfo", "MDE",
        "DeviceProcessEvents", "MDE",
        "DeviceRegistryEvents", "MDE",
        "IdentityDirectoryEvents", "MDI",
        "IdentityLogonEvents", "MDI",
        "IdentityQueryEvents", "MDI",
        "EmailAttachmentInfo", "MDO",
        "EmailEvents", "MDO",
        "EmailPostDeliveryEvents", "MDO",
        "EmailUrlInfo", "MDO",
        "CloudAppEvents", "MDA",
        "AlertInfo", "Alerts",
        "AlertEvidence", "Alerts"
    ];

// =====================
// Actual E5 ingestion from Usage
// =====================
let ActualE5 =
    Usage
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
    | where DataType in (
        "AADManagedIdentitySignInLogs", "AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs", "AADProvisioningLogs",
        "AADRiskyUsers", "AADServicePrincipalRiskEvents", "AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs",
        "AADUserRiskEvents", "ADFSSignInLogs", "AuditLogs", "SigninLogs",
        "DeviceEvents", "DeviceFileCertificateInfo", "DeviceFileEvents",
        "DeviceImageLoadEvents", "DeviceInfo", "DeviceLogonEvents",
        "DeviceNetworkEvents", "DeviceNetworkInfo", "DeviceProcessEvents", "DeviceRegistryEvents",
        "IdentityDirectoryEvents", "IdentityLogonEvents", "IdentityQueryEvents",
        "EmailAttachmentInfo", "EmailEvents", "EmailPostDeliveryEvents", "EmailUrlInfo",
        "CloudAppEvents", "AlertInfo", "AlertEvidence"
    )
    | summarize
        IngestedGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000.0,
        DaysWithData = dcount(startofday(TimeGenerated))
      by Table = DataType
    | extend
        IngestedGB = round(IngestedGB, 2),
        AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / iff(DaysWithData > 0, DaysWithData, 1), 2),
        IsEnabled = true
    | project Table, IsEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// =====================
// Final: E5 benefit coverage
// =====================
ExpectedE5
| join kind=leftouter ActualE5 on Table
| extend
    IsEnabled = coalesce(IsEnabled, false),
    IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0),
    AvgDailyGB = coalesce(AvgDailyGB, 0.0),
    Status = iff(IsEnabled, "Enabled", "Not Enabled"),
    ['Free Allowance (GB/Day)'] = FreeAllowanceGBPerDay
| project
    Section,
    Table,
    Status,
    ['Ingested GB'] = IngestedGB,
    ['Average Daily (GB)'] = AvgDailyGB,
    ['Free Allowance (GB/Day)']
| order by Section asc, Table asc

content.json:
## Microsoft 365 E5 Security Benefit

Organizations with **Microsoft 365 E5, A5, G5** or the **E5/A5/G5 Security add-on** receive a data ingestion benefit of **5 MB per user per day** for the following Sentinel tables. This benefit applies to the tables listed below when ingested through the relevant data connectors.

The tables are grouped by product area:
- **Entra ID / AAD** — Identity logs and sign-in data
- **Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (MDE)** — Device telemetry
- **Microsoft Defender for Identity (MDI)** — Identity threat detection
- **Microsoft Defender for Office 365 (MDO)** — Email security
- **Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps (MDA)** — Cloud app monitoring
- **Alert tables** — Alert metadata and evidence from Defender XDR

> 📖 [Microsoft Sentinel benefit for Microsoft 365 E5 customers](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sentinel/billing?tabs=simplified%2Ccommitment-tiers#microsoft-365-e5-a5-f5-and-g5-customers)
>
> 📖 [Tables eligible for the E5 benefit](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sentinel/microsoft-365-defender-sentinel-integration#tables-eligible-for-the-microsoft-365-e5-benefit)

content.query:
let lookback = 30d;

// =====================
// Defender for Servers P2 tables
// =====================
let DfSP2Tables = dynamic([
    "SecurityAlert",
    "SecurityBaseline",
    "SecurityBaselineSummary",
    "SecurityDetection",
    "SecurityEvent",
    "WindowsFirewall",
    "ProtectionStatus",
    "Update",
    "UpdateSummary",
    "MDCFileIntegrityMonitoringEvents",
    "WindowsEvent"
]);

// =====================
// Expected Defender for Servers P2 tables
// =====================
let ExpectedDfS =
    datatable(Table:string, Description:string)
    [
        "SecurityAlert", "Security alerts (also free tier - always free)",
        "SecurityBaseline", "Security baseline assessment results",
        "SecurityBaselineSummary", "Security baseline summary",
        "SecurityDetection", "Security detections",
        "SecurityEvent", "Windows Security Events (MMA/AMA)",
        "WindowsFirewall", "Windows Firewall events",
        "ProtectionStatus", "Antimalware protection status",
        "Update", "Update assessment (when Update Mgmt not running)",
        "UpdateSummary", "Update assessment summary (when Update Mgmt not running)",
        "MDCFileIntegrityMonitoringEvents", "File Integrity Monitoring events",
        "WindowsEvent", "Windows Events (AMA new format)"
    ];

// =====================
// Actual Defender for Servers P2 ingestion from Usage
// =====================
let ActualDfS =
    Usage
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
    | where DataType in (DfSP2Tables)
    | summarize
        IngestedGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000.0,
        DaysWithData = dcount(startofday(TimeGenerated))
      by Table = DataType
    | extend
        IngestedGB = round(IngestedGB, 2),
        AvgDailyGB = round(IngestedGB / iff(DaysWithData > 0, DaysWithData, 1), 2),
        IsEnabled = true
    | project Table, IsEnabled, IngestedGB, AvgDailyGB;

// =====================
// Final: Defender for Servers P2 coverage
// =====================
ExpectedDfS
| join kind=leftouter ActualDfS on Table
| extend
    IsEnabled = coalesce(IsEnabled, false),
    IngestedGB = coalesce(IngestedGB, 0.0),
    AvgDailyGB = coalesce(AvgDailyGB, 0.0),
    Status = iff(IsEnabled, "Enabled", "Not Enabled")
| project
    Table,
    Description,
    Status,
    ['Ingested GB'] = IngestedGB,
    ['Average Daily (GB)'] = AvgDailyGB
| order by Table asc

content.json:
---
## Defender for Servers Plan 2 Benefit

Machines protected by **Microsoft Defender for Servers Plan 2** receive a combined data ingestion benefit of **500 MB per VM per day** across all the following security data types. The allowance is the total across all VMs and applies to the sum of all tables below.

| Table | Description |
|---|---|
| SecurityAlert | Security alerts generated by Defender for Servers |
| SecurityBaseline | Security baseline assessment results |
| SecurityBaselineSummary | Summary of security baseline assessments |
| SecurityDetection | Security detections |
| SecurityEvent | Windows Security Events collected via AMA or MMA |
| WindowsFirewall | Windows Firewall events |
| ProtectionStatus | Antimalware protection status |
| Update | Update assessment results (when Update Management solution is not running or solution targeting is enabled) |
| UpdateSummary | Update assessment summary (when Update Management solution is not running or solution targeting is enabled) |
| MDCFileIntegrityMonitoringEvents | File Integrity Monitoring events from Defender for Cloud |
| WindowsEvent | Windows Events collected via AMA (new format) |

Note: SecurityAlert is also part of the free tier and is always free regardless of P2.

> 📖 [Defender for Servers data ingestion benefit](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/defender-for-cloud/faq-defender-for-servers#is-the-500-mb-of-free-data-ingestion-allowance-applied-to-an-entire-workspace-or-strictly-per-machine-)
>
> 📖 [Connect Windows security events to Sentinel](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sentinel/connect-windows-security-events)

content.query:

let startDate = {TimeRange:start}; // go back in time nn days

| where IsBillable == True

          predictionVolume = array_slice(GBytesForecast, array_length( GBytesForecast)-1, array_length( GBytesForecast)-1)[0]
| project priceToday =  todayVolume * {Price},

content.json: This Tab is used to recommend tasks to perform on a Daily, Weekly or Monthly basis.  These tasks have been taken from work in the community.

Daily Operational Tasks	
1. Data Connectors 
Look through active Data Connector and verify the Last Log Received date/time is current to ensure data is flowing.
2. Investigate Incidents and other, stats and checks 
Investigate Incidents to determine if any Analytics Alerts rules were triggered. Set status and begin investigation. Resolve or reassign.	
MTTC has been added and some MFA checks. Note Priviledge logon uses IdentityInfo and checks if a user is in any group with "Admin" in the name - so this may only be indicative of a priviledge logon.
3. Hunting Queries and Bookmarks (links provided)	
Explore the built-in query results. Update existing hunting queries and bookmarks. Manually generate new or update old Incidents if applicable. Apply automation (Playbooks) where required.	
4. Analytics Rules (links provided)	
Identify any newly released (or newly available due to recently connected Data Connectors) Analytics Rules and enable those that are applicable. Apply automation (Playbooks) where essential.
