content.query:
// for big systems 
// 1) Load mapping once (materialize prevents re-reading during joins)
let list_ = materialize(
    externaldata (
        Table:string, solution_Name:string, solution_Folder:string, solution_publisher_id:string, solution_offer_id:string,
        solution_first_publish_date:datetime, solution_last_publish_date:datetime, solution_version:string,
        solution_support_name:string, solution_support_tier:string, solution_support_link:string,
        solution_author_name:string, solution_categories:string, connector_id:string, connector_publisher:string,
        connector_title:string, connector_description:string, connector_instruction_steps:string, connector_permissions:string, connector_files:string, is_unique:bool
    )
    [@"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/refs/heads/master/Tools/Solutions%20Analyzer/solutions_connectors_tables_mapping.csv"]
    with (format="csv", ignoreFirstRecord=true)
);
// 2) Aggregate mapping once (keep it small)
let mapping = materialize(
    list_
    | summarize
        solution_Name = make_set(solution_Name, 200),
        connector_title = make_set(connector_title, 200),
        connector_description = make_set(connector_description, 200)
      by Table
);
// 3) Use Usage (hourly ingestion metadata) to find last hour each table ingested
Usage
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(14d)                 // tune window: 2d/7d
//| where DataType !endswith "_RST" and DataType !endswith "_SRCH"
| summarize
    LastIngestSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    IngestGB_24h = sumif(Quantity, TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)) / 1024.0
  by DataType, IsBillable
| extend SecondsSinceLastIngest = datetime_diff("second", now(), LastIngestSeen)
| join kind=leftouter mapping on $left.DataType == $right.Table
| extend Deprecated = iff(tostring(connector_description) has "[Deprecated]", true, false)
| extend Status = case(
        SecondsSinceLastIngest > 24*3600, "Delayed >24h",      // No ingest in 24h
        SecondsSinceLastIngest > 4*3600,  "Delayed >4h",     // No ingest in 4h
        "Healthy"
    )
| project
    ['Table Name'] = DataType,
    ['Seconds Since Last Ingest'] = SecondsSinceLastIngest,
    ['Last Ingest Seen (hourly)'] = LastIngestSeen,
    ['Ingest GB (24h)'] = round(IngestGB_24h, 2),
    IsBillable,
    Status,
    Deprecated,
    solution_Name,
    connector_title,
    connector_description
| order by ['Seconds Since Last Ingest'] desc, tostring(solution_Name) asc
content.title: Data Connector list and filter (for large data sets), count: {$rowCount}

content.query:
// Load connector mapping once
let list_ = 
externaldata (
    Table:string, solution_Name:string, solution_Folder:string, solution_publisher_id:string, solution_offer_id:string,
    solution_first_publish_date:datetime, solution_last_publish_date:datetime, solution_version:string,
    solution_support_name:string, solution_support_tier:string, solution_support_link:string,
    solution_author_name:string, solution_categories:string, connector_id:string, connector_publisher:string,
    connector_title:string, connector_description:string, connector_instruction_steps:string, connector_permissions:string, connector_files:string, is_unique:bool
)
[
 @"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/refs/heads/master/Tools/Solutions%20Analyzer/solutions_connectors_tables_mapping.csv"
]
with (format="csv", ignoreFirstRecord=true);
// Pre-aggregate once
let mapping =
list_
| summarize
    solution_Name = make_set(solution_Name),
    connector_title = make_set(connector_title),
    connector_description = make_set(connector_description)
  by Table;
// Only scan tables that exist in mapping
let tablesToCheck = toscalar(mapping | summarize make_set(Table));
union withsource=TableName1 *
| where TableName1 in (tablesToCheck)
//| where TableName1 !endswith "_RST" and TableName1 !endswith "_SRCH"
//| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| summarize 
    LastRecord = max(TimeGenerated)
    by TableName1
| extend ['Last Record Received'] = datetime_diff("second", now(), LastRecord)
| join kind=leftouter mapping on $left.TableName1 == $right.Table
| extend Deprecated = iff(array_length(connector_description) > 0 
                          and tostring(connector_description) has "[Deprecated]", 
                          true, false)
| extend Status = case(
    ['Last Record Received'] > 86400, "No data 24h",
    ['Last Record Received'] > 14400, "Delayed >4h",
    "Healthy"
)
| project 
    ['Table Name'] = TableName1,
    ['Last Record Received'],
    Status,
    Deprecated,
    solution_Name,
    connector_title,
    connector_description
| order by ['Last Record Received'] desc

content.json:
### Define your SLA's or 1=High, 8=Medium, 24=Low will be used 

## - change HELP toggle to YES for more detail on SLA and Median, Average and P90 (tail-risk)

| Metric      | Tells You             |
| ----------- | --------------------- |
| **Median**  | Typical performance   |
| **Average** | Total workload impact |
| **P90**     | Long-tail risk        |

For example: 
- Median = 45 minutes (looks great) 
- P90 = 900 minutes (problem!  “How bad things get when they go wrong.”) 
- Average = 200 minutes (tail influencing cost, a.k.a tail-risk) 
-
Median reflects reality, average reflects mathematical distortion.   
Most incidents close quickly, however a small number take a very long time (waiting on customer, forensic work, third parties, etc... which is refelcted in the Average,  put simply: Average gets Distorted by Outliers)

Example

Imagine 100 incidents:

- 85 resolved in under 60 minutes
- 10 resolved in 2–4 hours
- 5 took 20+ hours

Median might be:
- 45 minutes (looks healthy)  

But P90 might be:
- 12 hours  

That means:
- 10% of incidents take 12+ hours

That’s your tail risk.

content.query:
// Resolve workbook parameters (entered in HOURS) with defaults, convert to MINUTES
let SLA_High =
    iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{slaHigh}")), 60.0,  toreal("{slaHigh}") * 60.0);
let SLA_Medium =
    iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{slaMedium}")), 480.0, toreal("{slaMedium}") * 60.0);
let SLA_Low =
    iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{slaLow}")), 1440.0, toreal("{slaLow}") * 60.0);
let SLA_Info =
    iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{slaInfo}")), real(null), toreal("{slaInfo}") * 60.0);

let closedIncidents = materialize(
    SecurityIncident
    | where Status == "Closed"
    | where isnotempty(CreatedTime) and isnotempty(ClosedTime)
    | extend TTR_Minutes = todouble(datetime_diff("minute", ClosedTime, CreatedTime))
    | where TTR_Minutes >= 0
);

// Total minutes across all incidents (for % of SOC time)
let TotalMinutes = toscalar(
    closedIncidents
    | summarize sum(TTR_Minutes)
);

closedIncidents
| extend SLA_Minutes = case(
        Severity == "High", SLA_High,
        Severity == "Medium", SLA_Medium,
        Severity == "Low", SLA_Low,
        Severity == "Informational", SLA_Info,
        real(null)
    )
| summarize
    Incidents = count(),
    TotalMinutesSeverity = sum(TTR_Minutes),
    AvgTTR = avg(TTR_Minutes),
    MedianTTR = percentile(TTR_Minutes, 50),
    P90TTR = percentile(TTR_Minutes, 90),
    SLA_Target_Minutes = any(SLA_Minutes),
    WithinSLA = countif(isnotnull(SLA_Minutes) and TTR_Minutes <= SLA_Minutes),
    Breaches  = countif(isnotnull(SLA_Minutes) and TTR_Minutes >  SLA_Minutes)
  by Severity
| extend
    AvgTTR = round(AvgTTR, 2),
    MedianTTR = round(MedianTTR, 2),
    P90TTR = round(P90TTR, 2),
    PctOfTotalTime = iff(TotalMinutes > 0, round(TotalMinutesSeverity * 100.0 / TotalMinutes, 2), 0.0),
    SLA_Attainment = iff(isnull(SLA_Target_Minutes), real(null),
                         round(WithinSLA * 100.0 / (WithinSLA + Breaches), 2)),
    MedianVsSLA = case(
        isnull(SLA_Target_Minutes), "—",
        MedianTTR <= SLA_Target_Minutes, "✅ Within SLA",
        "❌ SLA Breach"
    ),
    P90VsSLA = case(
        isnull(SLA_Target_Minutes), "—",
        P90TTR <= SLA_Target_Minutes, "✅ Tail within SLA",
        "⚠️ Tail breaches SLA"
    ),
    SeverityOrder = case(
        Severity == "High", 1,
        Severity == "Medium", 2,
        Severity == "Low", 3,
        Severity == "Informational", 4,
        5
    )
| order by SeverityOrder asc
| project
    Severity,
    Incidents,
    ["Total Time Spent (minutes)"] = round(TotalMinutesSeverity, 2),
    ["Avg Time to Resolve (minutes)"] = AvgTTR,
    ["Median Time to Resolve (minutes)"] = MedianTTR,
    ["P90 Time to Resolve (minutes)"] = P90TTR,
    ["% of Total SOC Time"] = strcat(tostring(PctOfTotalTime), "%"),
    ["SLA Target (hours)"] = iff(isnull(SLA_Target_Minutes), real(null), round(SLA_Target_Minutes/60.0, 2)),
    ["Within SLA"] = WithinSLA,
    ["Breaches"] = Breaches,
    ["SLA Attainment %"] = iff(isnull(SLA_Attainment), "—", strcat(tostring(SLA_Attainment), "%")),
    ["Median vs SLA"] = MedianVsSLA,
    ["P90 vs SLA"] = P90VsSLA,
    SeverityOrder
| order by SeverityOrder asc
| project-away SeverityOrder

content.json:
Weekly Operational Tasks	
1. Log Analytics Agent
Verify the servers (or workstations) are showing a connected status in the workspace. Troubleshoot and remediate failed connections.
2. Workbooks Updates 
Verify in the Sentinel Dashboard blade if an installed Workbook has an update that needs installed.
3. GitHub Alert Rules, Workbooks, Hunting queries, Content Hub and Playbooks

content.query:
// Workbook parameters (defaults if empty)
let staleHours = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{staleHours}")), 1, toint("{staleHours}"));
let deadHours  = iff(isempty(trim(" ", "{deadHours}")), 24, toint("{deadHours}"));

// Pull Microsoft’s Solutions/Connectors/Tables mapping (includes offer id)
let list_ = materialize(
    externaldata (
        Table:string,
        solution_Name:string,
        solution_Folder:string,
        solution_publisher_id:string,
        solution_offer_id:string,
        solution_first_publish_date:datetime,
        solution_last_publish_date:datetime,
        solution_version:string,
        solution_support_name:string,
        solution_support_tier:string,
        solution_support_link:string,
        solution_author_name:string,
        solution_categories:string,
        connector_id:string,
        connector_publisher:string,
        connector_title:string,
        connector_description:string,
        connector_instruction_steps:string,
        connector_permissions:string,
        connector_files:string,
        is_unique:bool
    )
    [@"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/refs/heads/master/Tools/Solutions%20Analyzer/solutions_connectors_tables_mapping.csv"]
    with (format="csv", ignoreFirstRecord=true)
);

// Pre-aggregate to a compact lookup per table
let offersByTable = materialize(
    list_
    | summarize
        OfferIds = make_set(solution_offer_id, 50),
        Solutions = make_set(solution_Name, 50),
        ConnectorTitles = make_set(connector_title, 50),
        SupportLinks = make_set(solution_support_link, 10)
      by Table
);

Usage
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where DataType !endswith "_RST" and DataType !endswith "_SRCH"
| summarize
    LastIngestSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    IngestGB_24h = sumif(Quantity, TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)) / 1024.0
  by DataType, IsBillable
| extend SecondsSinceLast = datetime_diff("second", now(), LastIngestSeen)
| extend Status = case(
    SecondsSinceLast > deadHours*3600, "Dead",
    SecondsSinceLast > staleHours*3600, "Stale",
    "Healthy"
)
// Enrich with offer/solution metadata
| join kind=leftouter offersByTable on $left.DataType == $right.Table
| extend SupportLinks = iif(isempty(SupportLinks),'Other',SupportLinks) 
| extend SupportLinks = coalesce(SupportLinks, "")
| where SupportLinks has_any ( {selectType} )
| project
    DataType,
    Status,
    LastIngestSeen,
    SecondsSinceLast,
    IngestGB_24h = round(IngestGB_24h, 2),
    IsBillable,
    OfferIds,
    Solutions,
    SupportLinks
| order by Status desc, SecondsSinceLast desc

content.json:
This report provides a health overview of Microsoft Sentinel data ingestion.

It identifies tables as Healthy, Stale, or Dead based on when data was last received (configurable thresholds), shows ingestion volume for the past 24 hours, and maps each table to its associated Microsoft solution/offer.

Use this view to quickly detect broken connectors, ingestion gaps, and prioritise remediation.

This report compares today’s ingestion to weekday-aware rolling medians (30d/90d) and uses standard deviation to detect statistically significant drops. Tables below the minimum baseline are ignored to reduce noise. Each table gets a Status (Healthy/Warning/Degraded/Dead) and a 0–100 HealthScore so you can quickly prioritise the most severe ingestion regressions.

content.query:
let Base7d =
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| summarize
    LastIncidentSeen_7d = max(TimeGenerated),
    Incidents_7d = count(),
    Title_nonempty = arg_max(iif(isempty(Title), datetime(1900-01-01), TimeGenerated), Title).[1],
    Title_latest   = arg_max(TimeGenerated, Title).[1]
  by IncidentName
| extend Title = tostring(coalesce(Title_nonempty, Title_latest));

let BasePrev90d =
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(90d) .. ago(7d))
| summarize
    LastIncidentSeen_prev90d = max(TimeGenerated),
    Incidents_prev90d = count(),
    Title_nonempty = arg_max(iif(isempty(Title), datetime(1900-01-01), TimeGenerated), Title).[1],
    Title_latest   = arg_max(TimeGenerated, Title).[1]
  by IncidentName
| extend Title = tostring(coalesce(Title_nonempty, Title_latest));

let ByTitle7d =
Base7d
| summarize
    LastIncidentSeen_7d = max(LastIncidentSeen_7d),
    Incidents_7d = sum(Incidents_7d)
  by Title;

let ByTitlePrev90d =
BasePrev90d
| summarize
    LastIncidentSeen_prev90d = max(LastIncidentSeen_prev90d),
    Incidents_prev90d = sum(Incidents_prev90d)
  by Title;

// ---- 90-day daily series by Title (for workbook charting) ----
let Series90d =
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| extend TitleNorm = tostring(Title)
| where isnotempty(TitleNorm)
| make-series CountsSeries_90d = count() default=0
    on TimeGenerated from startofday(ago(90d)) to startofday(now()) step 1d
  by Title = TitleNorm;

// ---- Final output ----
ByTitlePrev90d
| join kind=fullouter ByTitle7d on Title
| join kind=leftouter Series90d on Title
| extend
    Incidents_7d = coalesce(Incidents_7d, 0),
    Incidents_prev90d = coalesce(Incidents_prev90d, 0),
    LastIncidentSeen_7d = todatetime(LastIncidentSeen_7d),
    LastIncidentSeen_prev90d = todatetime(LastIncidentSeen_prev90d)
| extend HealthFlag = case(
    Incidents_7d > 0 and LastIncidentSeen_7d >= ago(1d), "Healthy",
    Incidents_7d > 0 and LastIncidentSeen_7d <  ago(1d), "Warning (no incidents <24h)",
    Incidents_7d == 0 and Incidents_prev90d > 0, "Warning (No incidents 7d, had prev 90d)",
    Incidents_7d > 0 and Incidents_prev90d == 0, "New (not seen in prev 90d)",
    Incidents_7d == 0 and Incidents_prev90d == 0, "Unknown",
    "Unknown"
)
| where isnotempty(Title)
| order by Incidents_7d desc, LastIncidentSeen_7d desc
| project
    HealthFlag,
    Title,
    LastIncidentSeen_7d,
    Incidents_7d,
    LastIncidentSeen_prev90d,
    Incidents_prev90d,
    CountsSeries_90d
content.title: Compare Incident count by Title, for 7days vs. 90days, count: {$rowCount}

content.query:
//This query is a “rule firing drift” health check using SecurityAlert. It looks for alert names that were firing in the previous week but stopped or dropped sharply in the current week. 
 
  SecurityAlert
  | where TimeGenerated between (ago(14d) .. now())
  | extend Period = case(TimeGenerated >= ago(7d), "Current", "Prior")
  | summarize Cnt=count() by AlertName, Period
  | evaluate pivot(Period, sum(Cnt), AlertName)
  | extend Prior=coalesce(Prior, 0), Current=coalesce(Current, 0)
  | extend DropRatio = iff(Prior == 0, real(null), todouble(Prior - Current) / todouble(Prior))
  | extend Status = case(
      Prior > 0 and Current == 0, "Stopped",
      Prior >= 10 and DropRatio >= 0.80, "Dropped",
      "OK"
    )
  | where Status != "OK"
  | extend Severity = case(Status=="Stopped","High","Medium")
  | project
     // Category="Analytics",
     // Check="Rule firing drift (SecurityAlert proxy)",
      Resource=tostring(AlertName),
      Status,
      Severity,
     // When=now(),
      Metric=strcat("CurrentWeek=", Current, "; PriorWeek=", Prior,
                    iff(isnull(DropRatio), "", strcat("; Drop%=", round(DropRatio*100.0, 1)))),
      Details="A sudden stop/drop often indicates rule disabled/edited, missing upstream data, or schema/volume changes.",
      Action=case(
        Status=="Stopped", "Verify rule enabled and query still returns results; validate upstream ingestion and schema.",
        "Review recent tuning/threshold changes and upstream ingestion/volume shifts."
        )
content.title: “Rule firing drift” looks for alert names that were firing in the previous week but stopped or dropped sharply in the current week, count: {$rowCount}

content.json: This report groups incidents by Title and compares activity in the last 7 days against the previous 90-day period, producing a 90-day daily series for trend charts. Each Title receives a HealthFlag (Healthy / Warning / New / Unknown) based on counts and last-seen times to surface active, stale, or newly-emerging incident types. Use it to prioritise investigation, spot new incident classes, and monitor trends over time.

This report finds alert rules whose firing has stopped or dropped sharply by comparing the prior 7-day period to the most recent 7-day period. Alerts are flagged Stopped (went to zero) or Dropped (≥80% decline with prior ≥10 alerts), with severity and a compact metric string. Use this to rapidly detect disabled/edited rules, upstream ingestion/schema regressions, or unintended tuning changes.

content.query:
let Last7Days =
    SecurityAlert
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
    | summarize LastAlertSeen_7d = max(TimeGenerated),
                Alerts_7d = count()
        by ProductName;
let Previous90Days =
    SecurityAlert
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(90d) .. ago(7d))
    | summarize LastAlertSeen_90d = max(TimeGenerated),
                Alerts_90d = count()
        by ProductName;
Previous90Days
| join kind=fullouter Last7Days on ProductName
| extend
    Alerts_7d = coalesce(Alerts_7d, 0),
    Alerts_90d = coalesce(Alerts_90d, 0)
| extend HealthFlag = case(
        Alerts_7d > 0 and LastAlertSeen_7d >= ago(1d), "Healthy",
        Alerts_7d > 0 and LastAlertSeen_7d <  ago(1d), "Warning (no alerts <24h)",
        Alerts_7d == 0 and Alerts_90d > 0, "Warning (Low or No alerts)",
        Alerts_7d > 0 and Alerts_90d == 0, "New",
        "Unknown"
    )
| extend ProductName1 = iff(Alerts_7d > 0 and Alerts_90d == 0, ProductName1, "")
| order by HealthFlag asc, LastAlertSeen_7d asc
| project-rename PossiblyNewlyAdded = ProductName1
| project HealthFlag, ProductName, LastAlertSeen_7d, Alerts_7d, LastAlertSeen_90d, Alerts_90d, PossiblyNewlyAdded

content.json: This report compares alert counts for each ProductName over the last 7 days vs the previous 90-day window and assigns a HealthFlag (Healthy / Warning / New / Unknown). It highlights product sources that have stopped or reduced alerting, those with no recent alerts, and newly appearing sources — enabling quick prioritisation of ingestion, tuning, or onboarding checks.

content.query:
//Baseline comparison: last 7d vs previous 7d
//Severity that flips to Warning/Critical on big increases
//Metric = 7d GB (so the table still reads nicely)
//Details includes % change + prior GB

let Window = 7d;
let Current =
Usage
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(Window) .. now())
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize GB_7d = sum(Quantity) / 1024.0 by DataType;
let Previous =
Usage
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(2*Window) .. ago(Window))
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize GB_prev7d = sum(Quantity) / 1024.0 by DataType;
Current
| join kind=fullouter Previous on DataType
| extend
    DataType = coalesce(DataType, DataType1),
    GB_7d = coalesce(GB_7d, 0.0),
    GB_prev7d = coalesce(GB_prev7d, 0.0)
| extend 
    DeltaGB = GB_7d - GB_prev7d
| extend DeltaPct = iif(GB_prev7d == 0.0 and GB_7d > 0.0, 100.0,
                   iif(GB_prev7d == 0.0, 0.0, (DeltaGB / GB_prev7d) * 100.0))
| extend
    Status = case(
        GB_prev7d > 0 and DeltaPct >= 50 and DeltaGB >= 5, "Critical",
        GB_prev7d > 0 and DeltaPct >= 25 and DeltaGB >= 2, "Warning",
        GB_prev7d == 0 and GB_7d >= 2, "Warning",   // new billable source
        "Info"
    )
| extend Severity = Status
| top 10 by GB_7d desc
| project
    //Category = "Operations",
    //Check = "Top billable tables (Usage) - 7d vs prev 7d",
    Resource = tostring(DataType),
    Status,
    Severity,
    //When = now(),
    Capacity = round(GB_7d, 2),
    Details = strcat(
        "7d=", round(GB_7d, 2), "GB; prev7d=", round(GB_prev7d, 2), "GB; Δ=",
        round(DeltaGB, 2), "GB (", round(DeltaPct, 1), "%)."
    ),
    Action = case(
        Status == "Critical", "Investigate ingestion regression/noisy source; validate recent changes; tune diagnostics, DCR/DCE, connectors, or parsers.",
        Status == "Warning",  "Review recent onboarding/changes; confirm expected volume; tune collection filters/parsers/diagnostics if unexpected.",
        "Use weekly to catch ingestion/cost regressions and noisy sources."
    )

content.query:
SentinelHealth
  | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. now())
  | where tostring(SentinelResourceType) has "Analytics"
  | where Status in ("Failure","Failed","Warning","Partial Success","PartialSuccess")
  | summarize
      LastEvent=max(TimeGenerated),
      Failures=countif(Status in ("Failure","Failed")),
      Warnings=countif(Status == "Warning"),
      Partial=countif(Status in ("Partial Success","PartialSuccess")),
      SampleReason=any(Reason),
      SampleDescription=any(Description)
    by RuleName=tostring(SentinelResourceName), RuleKind=tostring(SentinelResourceKind), Operation=tostring(OperationName)
  | extend Status = case(Failures>0, "Failure", Partial>0, "Partial", Warnings>0, "Warning", "OK")
  | extend Severity = case(Status=="Failure","High", Status in ("Partial","Warning"),"Medium", "Low")
  | project
    //  Category="Analytics",
    //  Check="Rule execution health (SentinelHealth)",
      Resource=strcat(RuleName, iff(isempty(RuleKind), "", strcat(" [", RuleKind, "]"))),
      Status,
      Severity,
      When=LastEvent,
      Metric=strcat("Failures=", Failures, "; Partial=", Partial, "; Warnings=", Warnings, "; Op=", Operation),
      Details=strcat("Reason=", tostring(SampleReason), "; Desc=", substring(tostring(SampleDescription), 0, 220)),
      Action=case(
        Status=="Failure", "Open the health event; validate dependent tables, schema changes, query timeouts, thresholds; use rule insights/manual rerun.",
        Status=="Partial", "Confirm ingestion delay/partial data and rule settings; validate impacted connector(s).",
        "Review warning details; confirm rule remains effective."
      )

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend State = iff(LastHeartbeat < ago({UnhealthyCriteria}), 'Unhealthy', 'Healthy')
| extend TimeFromNow = now() - LastHeartbeat
| extend ["TimeAgo"] = strcat(case(TimeFromNow < 2m, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1m), ' seconds'), TimeFromNow < 2h, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1m), ' minutes'), TimeFromNow < 2d, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1h), ' hours'), strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1d), ' days')), ' ago')
| join (
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| extend Packed = pack_all()
) on Computer
| where TimeGenerated == LastHeartbeat
| join (
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| make-series InternalTrend=iff(count() > 0, 1, 0) default = 0 on TimeGenerated from {TimeRange:start} to {TimeRange:end} step {UnhealthyCriteria} by Computer
| extend Trend=array_slice(InternalTrend, array_length(InternalTrend) - 30, array_length(InternalTrend)-1)
| extend (s_min, s_minId, s_max, s_maxId, s_avg, s_var, s_stdev) = series_stats(Trend)
| project Computer, Trend, s_avg
) on Computer
| order by State, s_avg asc, TimeAgo
| project ["_ComputerName_"] = Computer, ["Computer"]=strcat('🖥️ ', Computer), State, ["Environment"] = iff(ComputerEnvironment == "Azure", ComputerEnvironment, Category), ["OS"]=iff(isempty(OSName), OSType, OSName), ["Azure Resource"]=ResourceId, ["Time"]=strcat('🕒 ', TimeAgo), ["Heartbeat Trend"]=Trend, ["Details"]=Packed

content.query:
resources
| where "{Subscription:Id}" has subscriptionId or "{Subscription}" == ""
| where type has 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions' or  type has 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where name has 'MicrosoftMonitoringAgent' or name has 'OmsAgentForLinux' or name has 'AzureMonitorWindowsAgent' or name has 'AzureMonitorLinuxAgent'
| extend AzureVM = extract('virtualMachines/(.*)/extensions',1,id), ArcVM = extract('machines/(.*)/extensions',1,id)
| summarize count() by AzureVM=tolower(AzureVM), ArcVM=tolower(ArcVM), subscriptionId, resourceGroup, AgentType=name
| extend hasBoth = iff(count_ > 1, 'Yes', 'No') //| where count_ > 1

content.query:
// Use Usage as a common Table that always exists - its data isnt required. 
union isfuzzy=true 
(
 Usage
 | project a = '{countRuleTemplates:value}'
 | limit 1
 | extend a = split(a,","), name_= "Available Rule Templates"
 | mv-expand a
 | summarize count(), rt=count() by name_
),
(
 Usage
 | project c = '{countActiveRules:value}', utw = '{activeRulesUpdatedDate:value}'
 | limit 1
 | extend c = split(c,","), name_= "Active Rules", utw = split(utw,",")
 | mv-expand c, utw
 | summarize count(), updateThisWeek = countif(todatetime(utw) between (ago(7d) .. now())), ar=count() by name_
),
(
 Usage
 | project d = '{huntingQueries:value}'
 | limit 1
 | extend d = split(trim(@"[^\w]+",d),","), name_= "Hunting Queries"
 | mv-expand d to typeof(string)
 | summarize count() by name_
)
| order by name_ asc

content.query:
// use a table that exists - Usage was picked but isnt used.
Usage
| project  a = split('{RuleByDate}',",")
| limit 1
| mv-expand todynamic(a)
| project b= split(trim(@"[^\w]+",tostring(a)),"T").[0]
| summarize count() by todatetime(b)
| order by b asc
| top 10 by b

content.query:
let window = 30d;
let end0 = now();
let start0 = end0 - window;
let end1 = start0;
let start1 = end1 - window;

let base =
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.LOGIC"
| where Category has "WorkflowRuntime"
| where TimeGenerated between (start1 .. end0)
| extend Period = case(
    TimeGenerated between (start0 .. end0), "Current30d",
    TimeGenerated between (start1 .. end1), "Prev30d",
    ""
)
| where Period != ""
| extend Playbook = extract(@"/WORKFLOWS/([^/]+)/RUNS/", 1, toupper(ResourceId))
| extend StatusRaw = coalesce(
    column_ifexists("status_s", ""),
    column_ifexists("Status_s", ""),
    column_ifexists("resultType_s", ""),
    column_ifexists("ResultType", ""),
    ""
)
| extend Status = tolower(tostring(StatusRaw))
| extend Outcome = case(
    Status in ("succeeded","success"), "Success",
    Status in ("failed","failure","timedout","timeout","cancelled","canceled"), "Failure",
    isempty(Status), "Unknown",
    "Other"
);

base
| summarize
    Total   = count(),
    Success = countif(Outcome == "Success"),
    Failure = countif(Outcome == "Failure"),
    Other   = countif(Outcome == "Other"),
    Unknown = countif(Outcome == "Unknown"),
    FailedPlaybooksArr = make_set_if(Playbook, Outcome == "Failure" and isnotempty(Playbook), 50)
  by Period
| extend EffectiveTotal = Success + Failure + Unknown   // excludes "Other"
| extend SuccessRatePct = round(
    100.0 * todouble(Success) / todouble(max_of(1, EffectiveTotal)),
    1
)
| extend RAG = case(
    SuccessRatePct < 90.0, "🔴 Red",
    SuccessRatePct < 97.0, "🟠 Amber",
    "🟢 Green"
)
| extend FailedPlaybooks = strcat_array(FailedPlaybooksArr, ", ")
| project Period, Total, Success, Failure, Unknown, Other, SuccessRatePct, RAG, FailedPlaybooks
| order by Period asc
content.title: KPI: Playbook failures per day (rolling 30d + prev 30d)

content.query:
let data =
    Usage
    | where TimeGenerated >= startofday(ago(90d))
    | extend Period = iff(TimeGenerated < ago(45d), "Previous 45 Days", "Last 45 Days")
    | summarize GB = sum(Quantity)/1024 by DataType, Period;

let pivoted =
    data
    | summarize GB=sum(GB) by DataType, Period
    | evaluate pivot(Period, sum(GB))
    | extend Previous = coalesce(['Previous 45 Days'], 0.0)
    | extend Recent   = coalesce(['Last 45 Days'], 0.0);

let totalRecent = toscalar(pivoted | summarize sum(Recent));

pivoted
| extend GrowthGB = round(Recent - Previous, 2)
| extend GrowthPct = iff(Previous == 0.0, real(0), round(100.0 * (Recent - Previous) / Previous, 1))
| extend ShareOfRecentPct = iff(totalRecent == 0.0, real(0), round(100.0 * Recent / totalRecent, 1))
| extend Direction = case(GrowthGB > 0, "Increase", GrowthGB < 0, "Decrease", "Stable")
| extend RAG = case(
        GrowthPct >= 25.0, "🔴 Red",
        GrowthPct >= 10.0, "🟠 Amber",
        "🟢 Green"
    )
| where abs(GrowthGB) > 1
| project
    DataType,
    Previous45DaysGB = round(Previous,2),
    Last45DaysGB = round(Recent,2),
    GrowthGB,
    GrowthPct,
    ShareOfRecentPct,
    Direction,
    RAG
| order by GrowthGB desc

| Column           | Meaning                            |
| ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| Previous45DaysGB | Baseline usage                     |

| GrowthGB         | Absolute change                    |
| GrowthPct        | % change                           |
| ShareOfRecentPct | Portion of total current ingestion |
| Direction        | Increase / Decrease / Stable       |
| RAG              | Materiality indicator              |


## Suggested RAG Meaning

- 🔴 **Red** → Material cost driver (>25% growth)  
- 🟠 **Amber** → Moderate upward drift (10–25%)  
- 🟢 **Green** → Stable / controlled

content.query:
Resources
| where type =~ "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"
| project
    WorkspaceResourceId = id,
    WorkspaceName = name,
    SubscriptionId = subscriptionId,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Location = location,
    State = tostring(properties.provisioningState),
    WorkspaceSkuRaw = tostring(properties.sku.name),
    WorkspaceSkuLastUpdate = tostring(properties.sku.lastSkuUpdate),
    RetentionDays = toint(properties.retentionInDays),
    DailyQuotaGbRaw = toreal(properties.workspaceCapping.dailyQuotaGb),
    Tags = tags
| extend WorkspaceResourceId_lc = tolower(WorkspaceResourceId)
// Friendly SKU formatting
| extend WorkspaceSku = case(
    tolower(WorkspaceSkuRaw) == "pergb", "Pay-as-you-go",
    isempty(WorkspaceSkuRaw), "Unknown",
    WorkspaceSkuRaw
)
// Daily cap formatting
| extend DailyDataCap = case(
    isnull(DailyQuotaGbRaw), "Not set",
    DailyQuotaGbRaw == -1, "Not set",
    tostring(DailyQuotaGbRaw)
)
// Governance indicators
| extend RetentionStatus = case(
    isnull(RetentionDays), "Unknown",
    RetentionDays < 90, "Below 90 days",
    "OK (>= 90 days)"
)
| extend CapStatus = case(DailyDataCap == "Not set", "Not set", "Set")
| extend SkuLastUpdate = iif(isempty(WorkspaceSkuLastUpdate), "Unknown", WorkspaceSkuLastUpdate)
| extend SkuUpdateAgeDays = iif(isempty(WorkspaceSkuLastUpdate), int(null), datetime_diff("day", now(), todatetime(WorkspaceSkuLastUpdate)))
| extend ChangesLikelyRAG = case(
    isnull(SkuUpdateAgeDays), "🟠 Unknown",
    SkuUpdateAgeDays < 30,    "🔴 Changes likely",
    "🟢 Stable"
)
// Join Sentinel solution by workspaceResourceId (normalized)
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type =~ "microsoft.operationsmanagement/solutions"
    | where name startswith "SecurityInsights("
    | project
        workspaceResourceId = tostring(properties.workspaceResourceId),
        workspaceResourceId_lc = tolower(tostring(properties.workspaceResourceId)),
        SentinelSolutionName = name,
        SentinelSolutionSkuRaw = tostring(properties.sku.name),
        SentinelSolutionState = tostring(properties.provisioningState),
        SentinelSolutionLastModified = tostring(properties.lastModifiedTime)
) on $left.WorkspaceResourceId_lc == $right.workspaceResourceId_lc
// Sentinel state logic
| extend SentinelEnabled = case(
    SentinelSolutionState =~ "Succeeded", "Yes",
    isnotempty(SentinelSolutionName) and isempty(SentinelSolutionState), "Provisioning / Unknown",
    isempty(SentinelSolutionName), "No",
    "Provisioning / Unknown"
)
| extend SentinelSolutionSku = case(
    tolower(SentinelSolutionSkuRaw) == "pergb", "Pay-as-you-go",
    isempty(SentinelSolutionSkuRaw), "",
    SentinelSolutionSkuRaw
)
// Notes
| extend Notes = case(
    SentinelEnabled == "Yes" and RetentionDays < 90, "Sentinel detected: consider raising retention to 90 days (free) if applicable",
    SentinelEnabled == "Yes" and RetentionDays >= 90, "Sentinel detected",
    SentinelEnabled != "Yes" and RetentionDays < 90, "Retention < 90 days",
    ""
)
| project
    WorkspaceName,
    WorkspaceResourceId,
    ResourceGroup,
    Location,
    State,
    SentinelEnabled,
    RetentionDays,
    RetentionStatus,
    DailyDataCap,
    CapStatus,
    WorkspaceSku,
    SkuLastUpdate,
    SkuUpdateAgeDays,
    ChangesLikelyRAG,
    SentinelSolutionState,
    SentinelSolutionSku,
    Notes,
    Tags
// --- Debug (uncomment if you want to validate joins) ---
// | project WorkspaceName, WorkspaceResourceId, WorkspaceResourceId_lc, workspaceResourceId, workspaceResourceId_lc, SentinelSolutionName, SentinelSolutionState
| order by WorkspaceName asc

content.query:
Syslog
  | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. now())
  | summarize
      Events=count(),
      MissingHost=countif(isempty(Computer) and isempty(HostName)),
      MissingProcess=countif(isempty(ProcessName)),
      MissingFacility=countif(isempty(Facility)),
      MissingSeverity=countif(isempty(SeverityLevel))
    by SrcHost = coalesce(HostName, Computer, "<unknown>")
  | where Events >= 200
  | extend
      MissingHostPct = todouble(MissingHost) / todouble(Events),
      MissingProcessPct = todouble(MissingProcess) / todouble(Events),
      MissingFacilityPct = todouble(MissingFacility) / todouble(Events),
      MissingSeverityPct = todouble(MissingSeverity) / todouble(Events)
  | extend WorstPct = max_of(MissingHostPct, MissingProcessPct, MissingFacilityPct, MissingSeverityPct)
  | extend Status = case(WorstPct >= 0.30, "Degraded", WorstPct >= 0.10, "Watch", "OK")
  | extend Severity = case(Status=="Degraded","High", Status=="Watch","Medium", "Low")
  | project
      Category="Parser",
      Check="Syslog header completeness",
      Resource=SrcHost,
      Status,
      Severity,
      When=now(),
      Metric=strcat("Events=", Events,
                    "; MissingHost%=", round(MissingHostPct*100.0, 1),
                    "; MissingProcess%=", round(MissingProcessPct*100.0, 1),
                    "; MissingFacility%=", round(MissingFacilityPct*100.0, 1),
                    "; MissingSeverity%=", round(MissingSeverityPct*100.0, 1)),
      Details=strcat("Counts: MissingHost=", MissingHost,
                     ", MissingProcess=", MissingProcess,
                     ", MissingFacility=", MissingFacility,
                     ", MissingSeverity=", MissingSeverity),
      Action=case(
        Status=="Degraded", "Check syslog forwarder/agent formatting; ensure RFC headers aren’t truncated and host/process fields are preserved.",
        Status=="Watch",    "Spot-check forwarder configs and validate parsing after updates.",
        "No action."
      )
content.title: Syslog parser check

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
  | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. now())
  | summarize
      Events=count(),
      MissingVendor=countif(isempty(DeviceVendor)),
      MissingProduct=countif(isempty(DeviceProduct)),
      MissingIPs=countif(isempty(SourceIP) and isempty(DestinationIP)),
      MissingAction=countif(isempty(Activity) and isempty(DeviceAction))
    by DeviceVendor, DeviceProduct
  | where Events >= 200
  | extend
      MissingVendorPct = todouble(MissingVendor) / todouble(Events),
      MissingProductPct = todouble(MissingProduct) / todouble(Events),
      MissingIPsPct     = todouble(MissingIPs) / todouble(Events),
      MissingActionPct  = todouble(MissingAction) / todouble(Events)
  | extend WorstPct = max_of(MissingVendorPct, MissingProductPct, MissingIPsPct, MissingActionPct)
  | extend Status = case(WorstPct >= 0.30, "Degraded", WorstPct >= 0.10, "Watch", "OK")
  | extend Severity = case(Status=="Degraded","High", Status=="Watch","Medium", "Low")
  | project
      Category="Parser",
      Check="CEF field completeness (CommonSecurityLog)",
      Resource=strcat(coalesce(DeviceVendor,"<empty>"), " / ", coalesce(DeviceProduct,"<empty>")),
      Status,
      Severity,
      When=now(),
      Metric=strcat("Events=", Events,
                    "; MissingVendor%=", round(MissingVendorPct*100.0, 1),
                    "; MissingProduct%=", round(MissingProductPct*100.0, 1),
                    "; MissingIPs%=", round(MissingIPsPct*100.0, 1),
                    "; MissingAction%=", round(MissingActionPct*100.0, 1)),
      Details=strcat("Counts: MissingVendor=", MissingVendor,
                     ", MissingProduct=", MissingProduct,
                     ", MissingIPs=", MissingIPs,
                     ", MissingAction=", MissingAction),
      Action=case(
        Status=="Degraded", "Inspect raw CEF payload + parser mapping; ensure vendor/product/IP/action fields are extracted consistently.",
        Status=="Watch",    "Spot-check forwarder/connector drift; validate normalization for vendor/product and IP/action mapping.",
        "No action."
      )
content.title: CommonSecurityLog parser check
